FPGA是如何诞生的

How the FPGA Came To Be

作者：史蒂文·莱布森

by Steven Leibson

FPGA的诞生历程（第一部分）

How the FPGA Came to Be, Part 1

1981年，我开始在科罗拉多州博尔德市的Cadnetix公司设计工程工作站。当时顶尖的计算机辅助工程（CAE）供应商——Daisy Systems、Mentor Graphics和Valid Logic（我称它们为“车管所”）——都和Cadnetix一样成立于1981年，并且各自开发了专有的CAE软件套件。我参与设计的五款Cadnetix专有工作站，从1982年到1985年陆续推出，它们都基于摩托罗拉半导体公司的68000系列微处理器（68000、68010和68020），运行着一个精简版的专有Unix操作系统（我私下里戏称它为“太监”）。

I started designing engineering workstations in 1981 for Cadnetix in Boulder, Colorado. The top computer-aided engineering (CAE) vendors of the day – Daisy Systems, Mentor Graphics, and Valid Logic (I called them the DMV) – were all founded in 1981, like Cadnetix, and each developed their own proprietary CAE software suite. The five proprietary Cadnetix workstations that I helped to design, introduced from 1982 to 1985, were all based on versions of Motorola Semiconductor’s 68000 microprocessor family (the 68000, 68010, and 68020) running a proprietary, stripped-down version of Unix (which I privately called Eunuch as an inside joke).

Daisy 的 CAE 软件用于逻辑设计，运行在 Daisy 专有的 Unix 版本 Daisy-DNIX 上，以及名为 Daisy Logician 的专有工程工作站上，后来发展为 Mega Logician。Mentor 的 CAE 软件用于 IC 布局和 PCB 设计，运行在早期的 Apollo DN100 工作站上，操作系统为 Apollo Aegis，后来发展为 Apollo/Domain。Valid Logic Systems 开发了一种原理图捕获软件，运行在名为 Scaldsystem 的专有工作站上，操作系统为专有的 Unix 版本。（Valid 最初名为 SCALD 公司，由 SCALD（“结构化计算机辅助逻辑设计”）的原始创建者创立，SCALD 是一套为支持劳伦斯·利弗莫尔国家实验室 S-1 超级计算机设计而开发的工具。）Valid 的其他逻辑仿真、静态时序分析和封装工具运行在数字设备公司 (DEC) 的 VAX 计算机上。

Daisy’s CAE software, used for logic design, ran on a proprietary Daisy version of Unix called Daisy-DNIX, on a proprietary engineering workstation called the Daisy Logician, followed by the Mega Logician. Mentor’s CAE software, used for IC layout and pcb design, ran on an early Apollo DN100 workstation under the Apollo Aegis and later the Apollo/Domain operating systems. Valid Logic Systems developed schematic capture software under a proprietary version of the Unix operating system on a proprietary workstation called the Scaldsystem. (Valid was originally named SCALD Corp, founded by the original creators of SCALD (“Structured Computer-Aided Logic Design”), a set of tools developed to support the design of the S-1 supercomputer at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratories.) Valid’s other tools for logic simulation, static timing analysis, and packaging ran on a Digital Equipment Corporation (DEC) VAX.

正如你所见，到 1981 年，工作站设计领域已经非常活跃。日后成为工作站巨头的 Sun Microsystems 公司成立于 1982 年。所有这些工作站设计，加上 DEC 的 VAX 及其竞争对手的大量小型计算机设计，为各种早期可编程逻辑创造了完美的市场。你需要快速、紧凑的逻辑电路开发方式，用于常见的地址译码器、状态机等，以及 Unix 系统所需的更复杂的内存管理硬件。最终，微处理器厂商会顺应潮流，将这些内存管理硬件集成到他们的微处理器中，但在 20 世纪 80 年代初期，你必须自己动手实现。

As you can see, there was a lot of workstation design taking place by 1981. Sun Microsystems, destined to become the 800-pound workstation gorilla, was founded in 1982. All of this workstation design, plus a robust amount of minicomputer design for DEC’s VAX and its competitors, created a perfect market for the many early forms of programmable logic. You needed fast, compact ways of developing logic for the usual stuff – address decoders, state machines, and the like – and for the more exotic memory-management hardware required by Unix systems. Eventually, the microprocessor vendors would get with it and design this memory-management hardware into their microprocessors, but, in the early 1980s, you had to roll your own.

在此期间，逻辑电路设计主要有两种方式：一是使用TTL芯片，二是如果订单量足够大，则可以设计定制逻辑芯片。（如今，我们称这些定制芯片为ASIC，但当时还没有这个术语。）使用少量TTL芯片会占用大量电路板空间，这不仅会增加PCB面积成本和功耗，而且定制芯片的设计难度更大，非经常性工程费用（NRE）更高，还会使设计周期延长数月。

During this period, the two main ways of designing logic was to use TTL chips or, if you had sufficient volume to justify it, design a custom logic chip. (Today, we call these custom chips ASICs, but the term had not been invented back then.) Handfuls of TTL chips took a lot of board space, which was costly in terms of pcb real estate and power consumption, and custom chips were much harder to design, costly in terms of NRE, and inserted months into your design cycle.

为了便于工程师快速开发、构建、测试和修改逻辑设计，对现场可编程逻辑器件（FPGA）的需求日益增长。半导体供应商敏锐地捕捉到了这一市场机遇，并积极应对挑战。首先出现的是现场可编程逻辑阵列（FPGA），随后是可编程逻辑阵列（PAL）、全局可编程逻辑阵列（GAL）和可编程逻辑控制器（CPLD）。最终，FPGA在1985年成为可编程逻辑器件领域的佼佼者。

There was a growing need for field-programmable logic devices so that engineers could develop logic designs, build them, test them, and revise them quickly. Semiconductor vendors recognized a market opportunity and stepped up to the challenge. First came field-programmable logic arrays (FPLAs), followed by PALs, GALs, and CPLDs. FPGAs finally appeared at the top of the programmable logic food chain in 1985.

在20世纪70年代末和80年代初，对设计工程师如何使用可编程逻辑进行最广为人知的描述，或许要数特雷西·基德（Tracy Kidder）1981年出版的畅销书《新机器的灵魂》（The Soul of a New Machine）。1982年，这本书荣获美国国家图书奖非虚构类奖项和普利策非虚构类奖项。它也成为MMI（Monolithic Memories）最有效的销售工具之一。

The most famous popular description of how design engineers used programmable logic back in the late 1970s and early 1980s is probably Tracy Kidder’s best-selling book The Soul of a New Machine, published in 1981. In 1982, this book won the National Book Award for Nonfiction and a Pulitzer Prize for General Non-Fiction. The book became one of MMI’s (Monolithic Memories) best sales tools.

基德的书描述了Eclipse MV/8000小型计算机的研发过程，这款计算机是DEC VAX的竞争对手，由Data General公司在20世纪80年代推出。该小型计算机的逻辑设计主要基于MMI公司的PAL（可编程阵列逻辑）器件，这些器件在书中占据了重要地位。说实话，我实在不明白一本关于PAL和系统工程的书怎么会成为全国畅销书。如果我知道，我自己也早就写出获奖畅销书了——不过，谈论PAL有点跑题了。这个故事要从PROM说起，或许还要更早一些。

Kidder’s book described the development of the Eclipse MV/8000 minicomputer, a DEC VAX competitor, which Data General launched in the 1980s. The logic design for this minicomputer was largely based on MMI’s PAL (programmable array logic) devices, which play a prominent role in the book. Honestly, I have no idea how a book about PALs and systems engineering can become a national best-seller. If I did, I’d be writing prize-winning best-sellers myself – but talk about PALs is getting ahead of this story. This story begins with PROMs, and maybe just a bit earlier.

现场可编程性几乎从集成电路（IC）发展之初就一直是IC设计的重要组成部分。我所知的最早的可编程IC是哈里斯半导体公司的HM-01xx商用二极管阵列。这些14引脚双列直插封装（DIP）器件包含40或48个硅二极管阵列，每个二极管都位于一块硅片上的介质隔离槽内，所有二极管通过铝互连线和熔断丝连接。熔断其中一个熔断丝需要750毫安的电流。以下是其中一个二极管阵列的原理图：

Field programmability has been an important aspect of IC design almost from the beginning of IC development. The very first programmable ICs I know about are the Harris Semiconductor HM-01xx Commercial Diode Matrices. These 14-pin DIP parts incorporated arrays of 40 or 48 silicon diodes, each nestled in a dielectrically isolated moat on one piece of silicon, and all connected by aluminum interconnect and fusible links. It took 750 mA to blow one of these fusible links. Here’s a schematic of one of those diode arrays:

哈里斯公司在 20 世纪 60 年代中期开始销售这些二极管阵列。以下是拿破仑·卡夫兰在计算机历史博物馆的一次口述历史中对这些阵列的描述。这次口述历史是卡夫兰与罗纳德·克莱恩的一次讨论，他们都曾在 Signetics 公司工作，参与开发了第一款现场可编程逻辑阵列 (FPLA)——Signetics 82S100：

Harris started marketing these diode arrays in the mid 1960s. Here’s what Napoleone Cavlan said about these arrays in a Computer History Museum oral history involving a discussion with Cavlan and Ronald Cline, who both worked at Signetics during the development of the first field-programmable logic array (FPLA), the Signetics 82S100:

“还有一种元件取得了一定的成功，我在1967年使用过。那是哈里斯公司生产的二极管矩阵，用可熔镍铬合金（我记得是）连接。每个封装大约有50个二极管，排列成行和列。我用它们为波塞冬导弹的ROM设计了一个磁芯存储器模拟器，作为其存储器的备份。我还设计了一个可以对这些芯片进行编程的编程器。”

“There was another element that had some modest success, which I used in 1967. These were diode matrices coupled with fusible nichrome [I believe] links manufactured by Harris. They had about 50 diodes per package,arranged in rows and columns. I used them to design a magnetic core memory simulator for a ROM as a backup for the memory on the Poseidon guidance missile. I also designed a programmer that would program these chips.”

我将在本系列文章的第二部分讨论卡夫兰和克莱恩关于Signetics 82S100 FPLA开发过程的口述历史，但这有点超前了。卡夫兰关于哈里斯二极管阵列的论述表明，集成熔断器（早期可编程逻辑芯片所需的关键片上元件）在20世纪60年代就已经存在了。

I’ll discuss Cavlan’s and Cline’s oral history about the development of the Signetics 82S100 FPLA in Part 2 of this article series, but that’s getting a bit ahead of the story. Cavlan’s statement about the Harris diode arrays shows that integrated fusible links, a critical on-chip element needed to create early programmable logic chips, existed by the 1960s.

在卡夫兰的口述历史中读到关于哈里斯二极管阵列的描述后，我查阅了相应的数据手册。当我第一次在数据手册中看到这些二极管阵列时，我不禁思考它们可能有什么用途。突然，我恍然大悟。这种顿悟将我带回到了十年前我写过的一个故事。那是关于斯坦利·弗兰克尔的故事，他是早期计算机先驱，在我开始研究他的时候，他几乎被历史的尘埃所掩盖。我花了三年时间挖掘，才找到足够的信息来讲述弗兰克尔的故事。

After reading about these Harris diode arrays in Cavlan’s oral history, I looked up the corresponding data sheet. When I first saw these diode arrays in the data sheet, I wondered what application they might be used for. Suddenly, I felt a connection snap into place. That connection transported me to a story I wrote a decade ago. It’s the story of Stanley Frankel, an early computer pioneer who was almost lost in the mists of time when I started my research. It took me three years of digging to unearth enough information about Frankel to tell his story.

二战期间，弗兰克尔在新墨西哥州洛斯阿拉莫斯为罗伯特·奥本海默参与曼哈顿计划时，深深爱上了机器计算。他曾是奥本海默的研究生，奥本海默带他去洛斯阿拉莫斯协助研制原子弹。弗兰克尔是利用机器计算模拟物理过程的专家。

Frankel fell in love with machine calculation while working for Robert Oppenheimer on the Manhattan project in Los Alamos, New Mexico during World War II. He’d been one of Oppenheimer’s grad students, and Oppenheimer took him to Los Alamos to help develop the atomic bomb. Frankel was an expert on simulation of physical processes using machine computation.

起初，他使用机电式的马钱特和弗里丹计算器进行原子弹模拟。弗兰克尔开发出将大型物理计算任务分拆给“计算机”的方法，在当时，“计算机”指的是操作这些计算器的女性。弗兰克尔当时并不知道，他正在开发利用计算机算法解决重大问题的原型。后来，弗兰克尔将这些算法移植到洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室新购置的IBM制表卡读卡器上，以辅助计算。

At first, he ran atomic bomb simulations on electromechanical Marchant and Friedan calculators. Frankel developed methods for farming out pieces of a large physics computation to “computers,” which in those days were women operating one of these calculators. Frankel didn’t know it, but he was developing the prototypes for solving big problems using computer algorithms. Later, Frankel moved these algorithms to new IBM tabulating card readers that Los Alamos acquired to help with the computations.

最终，弗兰克尔与ENIAC——世界上第一台全电子可编程数字计算机——建立了联系。在曼哈顿计划的最后几项任务中，就在战争即将结束之际，弗兰克尔的任务之一是运行一个过于简化的一维氘氚聚变反应模拟程序，以验证爱德华·泰勒关于假想氢弹爆炸内部反应序列的理论。弗兰克尔的模拟程序是ENIAC上运行的第一个真正意义上的程序。此前的程序只是计算机开发人员为了找出机器漏洞而创建的测试套件。

Ultimately, Frankel connected with ENIAC, the world’s first all-electronic, programmable digital computer. One of Frankel’s last tasks on the Manhattan project, just as the war was ending, was to run an oversimplified, one-dimensional simulation of a deuterium-tritium fusion reaction to verify Edward Teller’s theories about the reaction sequence inside of a hypothetical hydrogen bomb detonation. Frankel’s simulation was the first real program to be run on ENIAC. Prior programs had been just test suites created by the computer’s developers to wring out bugs in the machine.

弗兰克尔的热核模拟程序需要一百万张穿孔的霍勒瑞斯卡片，这些卡片装在火车车厢里，从新墨西哥州运到位于宾夕法尼亚州摩尔科学学院的ENIAC计算机所在地。这些穿孔卡片只包含数据。ENIAC并非存储程序计算机。它的编程方式与FPGA类似，需要通过物理方式，使用导线连接各个功能单元，从而创建所需的运算序列。ENIAC此次计算的结果至今仍属机密，但我们知道，弗兰克尔带着他的研究成果返回后，洛斯阿拉莫斯继续推进了泰勒氢弹的研发。

Frankel’s thermonuclear simulation program required one million punched Hollerith cards, shipped in a train boxcar from New Mexico to ENIAC’s home at the Moore School in Pennsylvania. These punched cards contained only data. ENIAC was not a stored-program computer. You programmed it physically, a little like an FPGA, using wires to interconnect various function units to create the desired sequence of operations. Results of this particular ENIAC computation are still classified, but we do know that Los Alamos pursued development of Teller’s hydrogen bomb after Frankel returned with his results.

到了1950年，弗兰克尔——这位成功为美国国防部开发出首个用于制造核武器和热核武器的模拟算法的人——却因为乔·麦卡锡、众议院非美活动调查委员会（HUAC）和红色恐慌而失去了安全许可。为什么？弗兰克尔究竟犯了什么罪，或者违反了什么信任？原来，弗兰克尔的父亲（而非弗兰克尔本人）在20世纪30年代曾是共产党员，而这足以让弗兰克尔失去继续参与秘密国防项目的资格。

By 1950, Frankel – the man who successfully developed the first simulation algorithms for creating both nuclear and thermonuclear weapons for the US Defense Department – had lost his security clearance, thanks to Joe McCarthy, HUAC, and the Red Scare. Why? What crime or breach of trust had Frankel committed? Frankel’s father, not Frankel, had been a communist in the 1930s, and that’s all it took to disqualify Frankel from further work on secret defense projects.

由于需要从事非机密工作，弗兰克尔与同事埃尔德雷德·尼尔森合伙创办了一家咨询公司，后来加入了加州理工学院工程学院新成立的数字计算小组。当时，这是他继续从事计算机相关工作的唯一途径。那时所有的计算机基本上都是大型机。

In need of non-classified work, Frankel started a consulting practice with a colleague, Eldred Nelson, and later joined a newly formed digital computing group within CalTech’s Engineering Division in Pasadena, California. It was the only way he could continue to work with computers at the time. All computers were essentially mainframes back then.

在加州理工学院期间，弗兰克尔设计了一台仅使用113个真空管和一个磁鼓作为存储器的计算机。他之所以能够用极少的有源元件设计出这台计算机，是因为他用1450个锗二极管实现了大部分数字逻辑，包括指令解码器。正如弗兰克尔在描述这一设计的论文中所写：“逻辑设计是通过一个逻辑网络实现的，该网络主要由电阻器和晶体二极管组成。”

While at Caltech, Frankel designed a computer using only 113 vacuum tubes and a magnetic drum for memory and storage. He managed to design a computer using very few active elements because he implemented most of the digital logic, including instruction decoders, using 1450 germanium diodes. As Frankel wrote in his paper describing this design: “The logical design is realized by a logical network, composed primarily of resistors and crystal diodes.”

弗兰克尔将他那台拥有113个电子管的计算机命名为“MINAC”，类似于“极简版ENIAC”。他于1954年设计了这台计算机，到1956年，MINAC便成为一台商用计算机。Librascope公司从弗兰克尔那里获得了MINAC的设计许可，并以此为基础生产了桌面大小的Librascope LGP-30计算机。据一些说法，LGP-30是第一台“个人”计算机。它无需分时共享；不需要专门的空调机房；而且使用标准的115伏电源即可运行。除了被广泛用作数据处理的通用计算机外，LGP-30还被用作工业测试和过程控制的嵌入式计算机。

Frankel called his 113-tube computer the “MINAC,” sort of a “minimal ENIAC.” He designed the computer in 1954, and by 1956, MINAC became a commercial computer. Librascope licensed the MINAC design from Frankel and used it to produce the desk-sized Librascope LGP-30 computer. By some accounts, the LGP-30 was the first “personal” computer. It was not timeshared; it didn’t require special air-conditioned rooms; and it ran on power from a standard 115-volt wall current. In addition to being widely used as a general-purpose computer for data processing, the LGP-30 was also used as an embedded computer for industrial testing and process control.

MINAC 设计中使用的二极管来自附近休斯半导体公司的废品堆，该公司当时刚刚开始生产锗二极管。休斯鼓励弗兰克尔从废品堆里随便拿。这些二极管虽然不符合规格，但在逻辑电路中却能正常工作。十年后，哈里斯半导体公司开始生产带有现场可编程熔丝的 40 二极管阵列和 48 二极管阵列，并将其推向数字电路设计领域。

The diodes used in the MINAC design came from a component reject barrel at nearby Hughes Semiconductor, which had just started manufacturing germanium diodes. Hughes encouraged Frankel to take as many as he liked from the reject pile. They didn’t meet spec, but they worked just fine in logic circuits. Ten years later, Harris Semiconductor was making 40- and 48-diode arrays with field-programmable fuses and marketing them to digital designers.

没错。在数字集成电路出现之前，我们曾经只用分立二极管和电阻器来实现逻辑门。这被称为二极管逻辑（DL）或二极管电阻逻辑（DRL）。弗兰克尔在20世纪60年代中期为SCM公司设计桌面计算器时，就沿用了这种使用大量廉价、非标准二极管来实现逻辑功能的思路。这款名为Cogito 240的计算器间接促成了惠普公司进军计算器市场。（但这又是另一个故事了，以后有机会再讲。）

Yes, that’s right. We once used nothing but discrete diodes and resistors to implement logic gates before digital ICs appeared. It was called diode logic (DL) or diode-resistor logic (DRL). Frankel reused this idea – of using lots of cheap, off-spec diodes, to implement logic functions – when he designed a desk calculator for SCM in the mid-1960s. That calculator, the Cogito 240, was indirectly responsible for HP’s entry into the calculator market. (But that’s another story, for another time.)

当我看到哈里斯二极管阵列的数据手册和电路图时，我立刻想起了弗兰克尔在MINAC设计中使用的1450锗二极管。这些二极管阵列显然是可编程器件，可以用来构建逻辑电路，但它们还不是可编程逻辑器件。

When I saw the data sheet for the Harris diode arrays, and the schematics for the devices, I immediately recalled the 1450 germanium diodes that Frankel used in the MINAC’s design. These diode arrays were clearly programmable devices. They could be used to build logic circuits, but they weren’t yet programmable logic devices.

1984 年 Harris Bipolar 产品目录中的二极管阵列数据手册自豪地宣称这些阵列“与 CMOS 兼容”。我不明白这究竟是什么意思，但这就是集成电路营销的惯用伎俩。或许是指该阵列 20 伏的反向击穿电压。理论上，如果你不介意冒着“触雷”的风险，一些早期的 CMOS 逻辑系列可以在高达 18 伏的电源电压下运行。这种风险源于电源电压尖峰导致集成电路内部的可控硅整流器 (SCR) 闩锁效应，并可能在无限大的电源电流下烧毁器件。CMOS 闩锁效应在 20 世纪 80 年代仍然是一个严重的问题。现在这个问题已经不再存在了。（当然，这又是另一个故事了，以后有机会再讲。）

A diode array data sheet from the 1984 Harris Bipolar catalog proudly proclaims that these arrays are “CMOS compatible.” It’s not clear to me what that’s supposed to mean, but that’s IC marketing for you. Perhaps it’s a reference to the array’s 20-volt reverse breakdown voltage. In theory, you could run some early CMOS logic families at supply voltages as high as 18 volts if you didn’t mind risking the chance of “riding the lightning” by inducing SCR latchup inside of the IC from a power supply voltage spike and watching the device fry as it drew unlimited supply current. CMOS latchup was a serious problem well into the 1980s. It no longer is. (Yes, that’s another story, for another time, too.)

到 1970 年，哈里斯宣布了可编程逻辑发展史上的下一个里程碑——双极型 PROM。这些小型 PROM 中的可编程元件是可熔金属触点，由镍铬合金而非铝制成。双极型 PROM 当然可以用来创建逻辑电路的查找表。它们非常适合开发小型逻辑电路和状态机，但当时可用的 PROM 容量只有 32×8 位和 256×4 位，因此逻辑设计人员能够利用的输入输出引脚非常有限，难以根据 PROM 查找表创建逻辑。

By 1970, Harris had announced the next evolutionary step in the history of programmable logic, the bipolar PROM. The programmable elements in these small PROMs were fusible metal links, made from nichrome instead of aluminum. Bipolar PROMs can certainly be used to create lookup tables for logic circuits. They’re fine for developing small logic circuits and state machines, but with the PROM sizes available at the time, 32×8 and 256×4 bits, they offered the logic designer very few input and output pins for creating logic from PROM lookup tables.

双极型可编程只读存储器（PROM）对可编程逻辑发展的最大贡献或许在于其制造和测试方法的发展，这些方法确保了PROM片上熔断链路的可靠性。哈里斯在其PROM设计中增加了测试行和测试列，以便在晶圆探测过程中进行破坏性熔断测试。在晶圆测试期间，对每个器件的每一行和每一列都进行熔断测试，极大地提高了器件整体功能的可靠性。

Perhaps the bipolar PROM’s biggest contribution to the development of programmable logic was the development of the manufacturing and test methodologies needed to ensure that the PROM’s on-chip fusible links were reliable. Harris added test rows and columns to its PROM designs to allow destructive fuse testing during wafer probing. Blowing one fuse in each row and column on every device during wafer testing went a long way towards ensuring overall device functionality.

到了20世纪70年代中期，制造现场可编程逻辑芯片所需的所有组件都已就绪。剩下的就是有人将这些组件组装起来，制造出相应的器件。这正是本系列文章第二部分的主题，EEJournal将于本周晚些时候发表。 

By the middle of the 1970s, all of the bits and pieces needed to create field-programmable logic chips were in place. What remained was for someone to put these pieces together and build the devices. That’s the subject covered in Part 2 of this article series, which EEJournal will publish later this week. 

参考：

References:

Signetics FPLF 口述历史小组，计算机历史博物馆，2009 年 9 月 15 日。

Signetics FPLF Oral History Panel, Computer History Museum, September 15, 2009.

Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 22V10 可编程阵列逻辑 (PAL) 开发团队口述历史小组，计算机历史博物馆，2012 年 7 月 19 日。

Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 22V10 Programmable Array Logic (PAL) Development Team Oral History Panel, Computer History Museum, July 19, 2012.

FPGA的诞生历程（第二部分）：Signetics公司创造了首个成功的可编程逻辑器件：FPLA

How the FPGA came to be, Part 2 Signetics Created the First Successful Programmable Logic Device: The FPLA

本系列文章的第一部分讨论了最早可用于实现逻辑电路的可编程集成电路。虽然哈里斯半导体公司的可编程二极管阵列和可编程只读存储器（PROM）并非真正的可编程逻辑器件，但它们为后来的可编程逻辑器件（PLD）奠定了基础。

Part 1 of this article series discussed the earliest programmable ICs that could be used to implement logic circuits. Not quite programmable logic, Harris Semiconductor’s programmable diode arrays and PROMs laid the groundwork for PLDs (programmable logic devices) to come.

这就引出了拿破仑·卡夫兰、罗纳德·克莱恩以及Signetics公司如何开发出首款商业上取得成功的FPLA（现场可编程逻辑阵列）的故事。克莱恩和卡夫兰都拥有存储器集成电路设计经验，并且他们都恰好在可编程逻辑技术迈向下一个发展阶段的关键时刻加入了Signetics公司。卡夫兰负责市场营销，而克莱恩则负责设计工程。

This is where we return to Napoleone Cavlan, Ronald Cline, and the story of how Signetics developed the first commercially successful FPLA (field programmable logic array). Cline and Cavlan both had memory IC design experience and both joined Signetics at just the right time to participate in the next evolutionary step for programmable logic. Cavlan was in marketing and Cline was in design engineering.

工程师们早已熟悉使用可编程逻辑阵列 (PLA) 进行状态机设计。例如，1975 年我加入惠普计算器产品部门的研发实验室时，实验室里的每位设计工程师都人手一本克里斯·克莱尔 (Chris Clare) 的开创性著作《使用状态机设计逻辑系统》(Designing Logic Systems Using State Machines )。克莱尔当时是惠普实验室的项目经理。基于克莱尔方法论的设计，特别是芯片设计，都依赖于掩模可编程逻辑阵列 (MPLA)，克莱尔在其著作的第五章对此进行了详尽的讨论。

Engineers were already familiar with state-machine design using programmable logic arrays (PLAs). For example, when I joined the R&D lab at HP’s Calculator Products Division in 1975, every design engineer in the lab had a copy of Chris Clare’s seminal book on the topic, Designing Logic Systems Using State Machines. Clare was a Project Manager at HP Labs. Designs, particularly chip designs based on Clare’s methodology, relied on mask programmable logic arrays (MPLAs), discussed extensively in Chapter V of Clare’s book.

1973年，美国国家半导体公司推出了具有14个输入和8个输出的DM7575 MPLA。由于该器件速度较慢（传播延迟为90纳秒），且需要经过集成电路制造厂添加最终金属层进行特性分析，而这是一个相对缓慢且昂贵的过程，因此美国国家半导体公司的MPLA并未取得太大的商业成功。

In 1973, National Semiconductor introduced the DM7575 MPLA with 14 inputs and 8 outputs. National’s MPLA didn’t meet with a lot of commercial success because it was a slow device (it had a 90 nsec propagation delay) and because it needed to pass through an IC fab to add the final metal layer for characterization, which was a relatively slow and expensive process.

集成式片上掩模编程阵列 (MPLA) 在设计定制集成电路时非常实用，因为您知道其中会用到一套定制掩模。然而，在设计电路板时，设计和制造掩模编程器件的需求会严重影响项目进度。系统设计人员迫切需要现场可编程逻辑阵列 (FPLA)。

Integrated, on-chip MPLAs work great when you’re designing custom ICs, because you know there will be a set of custom masks involved. However, when you are designing boards, the need to design and fabricate a mask-programmed part throws a real kink into the project schedule. Systems designers sorely needed a field-programmable logic array (FPLA).

尽管National公司的DM7575 MPLA在商业上并不成功，但它意义重大，因为它为Signetics公司于1975年推出的现场可编程逻辑阵列82S100奠定了基础。正如Cavlan在他的口述历史中所解释的那样：

Although not commercially successful, National’s DM7575 MPLA was significant because it served as the basis for the field programmable logic array produced by Signetics in 1975, the 82S100. As Cavlan explained in his oral history:

“……1975年，美国国家半导体公司（National Semiconductor）的MPLA器件问世，但由于它是掩模编程的，因此并未获得广泛认可。逻辑设计通常并非一个结构化的过程。事实上，如果你谈论的是随机逻辑，那么大多数情况下确实如此。这就是它被称为随机逻辑的原因。你不可避免地会遇到各种变化，而MPLA这种掩模编程器件并不适合处理这些变化。因此，这种器件的唯一用途是用于结构化程度更高的逻辑，例如查找表，在这些应用中，你或多或少可以预先知道电路的组织结构和功能。但即便如此，MPLA仍然未能取得成功。”

“…in 1975, the National MPLA device was available and did not enjoy big popularity because of the fact that it was mask-programmed. Often, logic design is not a very structured process. Actually, most of the time it isn’t, if you’re talking about random logic. That’s why the name comes to mind – random logic. The inevitable changes that you would incur would not be suitable for using an MPLA, a mask-programmed device. So, the only use you could have for this part was in more structured logic like look-up tables where you knew more or less in advance what the organization was going to be and the function. But despite all of that, the MPLA was not successful.”

克莱恩在口述历史的后续部分继续讨论了这一话题：

Cline continues this discussion later in the oral history:

“当时的大型电子公司都知道PLA是什么。他们在CPU内部使用掩模可编程PLA作为微代码或微指令生成器，但是，正如我刚才所说，他们从未考虑过这种可能性。再说一遍，在4K PROM成功之后，大约就在这个时候，Napoleone出现了。我记得当时我对此一无所知。没有人告诉我。”

“The big iron companies at the time knew what PLAs were. They used mask programmable PLAs as microcode or micro instruction generators inside their CPUs, but, again, because of what I was just telling you earlier, there was just never any consideration of the possibility. Again, after the 4K [PROM] worked, it was at about this time that Napoleone came on. As I recall, I didn’t know anything at the time. Nobody had told me.

“他们不想让我分心去想另一个正在酝酿的想法，但我发现桌上有一张霍尼韦尔（当时的大型钢铁公司之一）工程师的请求，‘我们能否制造一种可熔断或熔接的PLA？’那是我第一次见到这个概念，但话说回来……我认为技术能力、电路能力、应用和知识，再加上对客户需求的内在认知，所有这些因素似乎都同时出现了。”

“They didn’t want to defocus me about this other idea that was floating around, but I found on my desk a request from an engineer from Honeywell, one of the big iron companies at the time, ‘Could we make a fusable or a fused link PLA?’ That was the first time I’d ever seen the concept, but, again, it was something that… I think the technology capability, the circuit capability, the applications and knowledge, plus a built-in recognition of customer desire I think just sort of came around at all the same time.”

卡夫兰随后解释了FPGA概念是如何形成的：

Cavlan then explains how the FPGA concept gelled:

“我们的想法是，由于掩模编程器件的成功以及人们希望在设计环境中修改逻辑，这种器件似乎具有很大的市场吸引力。因此，将这种意图转化为架构，基本上就是说：‘好的，既然已经有了掩模编程版本，那我们就做一个现场可编程版本，并且做一个可以面向各种应用的版本，这些应用不仅限于位级应用，也包括字节级应用。’”

“The idea was that this was a device that seemed to have a lot of general market appeal because of the success of the mask programmed devices and the desirability by people to modify logic in their design environment. So to translate that intent into the architecture was basically saying, ‘Okay, well there is a mask-programmed version available. Let’s make a field-programmable version, and make one that can be targeted to a broad range of applications that are not just bit oriented, also byte oriented.’

“因此，我主动研究了这两个领域，并且确信，如果设计一种设备，它具有一组可编程的与门和可编程的或门，但其 I/O 组合基本上是按字节组织的（在我们的特定情况下，它是 16 个输入和 8 个输出），并带有输出门控使能端，那么它不仅可以用于从设备中生成位逻辑切片……”

“And in that respect, I took it upon myself to take a look in these two areas, and I was convinced that in architecting a device that has a set of programmable AND gates and programmable OR gates but with an I/O combination which was basically byte organized (in our particular case it was 16 inputs and 8 outputs) with an enable for the output gating, it would be useful not only for generating bit logic slices out of the device…”

利用这些概念，克莱恩设计了第一款商业上成功的 FPLA，即 Signetics 82S100。它可以替代一些 TTL 芯片，但它在器件中存在 50 纳秒的传播延迟。

Using these concepts, Cline designed the first commercially successful FPLA, the Signetics 82S100. It could replace a handful of TTL chips, but it had a 50 nsec propagation delay through the part.

卡夫兰在他的口述历史中详细描述了当时的情况：

Cavlan details the situation in his oral history:

“我们第一代FPLA（82S100、PLS100）的架构基本上是与或/或非结构，因为其输出端内部极性反转，所以可以实现与或或与非运算。但它的输入宽度非常大，可以同时输入16个变量，并将它们送入任何一个门。不仅如此，还可以使用多个与门，并随意分配到各个输出端，甚至可以共享这些与门。”

“The architecture of our first FPLA (82S100, PLS100) was basically an AND-OR/NOR structure because there was a polarity inversion on the outputs, I mean internally, so you could do AND-OR or AND-NOR functions. But it had a very large input width so that you could take 16 variables at the same time and put them into any one gate. Not only that but you could take a number of AND gates and distribute them at will among the outputs and also you could share them.

“所以，当你观察用TTL实现的逻辑功能时，通常需要处理所有输入，即使对于单个芯片，最终也需要好几层TTL封装。观察这条链路，你会发现延迟有时比单个FPLA要大得多。有时延迟又会更小。TTL链路速度更快。在这些情况下，FPLA并非最佳解决方案，但如果速度不是关键因素，你仍然可以享受将所有TTL芯片封装在FPLA单个封装中的优势，这非常有用。”

“So when you looked at the logic function done with TTL, usually by manipulating all those inputs, even for a single slice, you ended up with several levels of TTL packages. When you looked at that chain, the delay was sometimes much greater than just one FPLA. Sometimes the delay was smaller. It was a faster chain with TTL. In those cases, the FPLA was not the best solution, but if speed was not critical you still had the advantage of putting all those TTL chips in one package into the FPLA, one single package, and that was very useful.”

Signetics 82S100 的原理图如下所示。水平行和垂直列的每个交叉点处都有一个保险丝（原理图中未显示）。

A schematic of the Signetics 82S100 appears below. There’s a fuse (not shown on the schematic) at every intersection of the horizontal rows and vertical columns.

Signetics 82S100 的销量相当不错，甚至被 Commodore 公司设计用于其个人电脑，包括 Commodore 64。（Commodore 64 电脑中使用的 82S100 FPLA 芯片在服役近四十年后似乎出现了故障。这个问题相当普遍，以至于催生了几种替代设计，这些设计基于子板，使用一个 27C512 EPROM、一对 PAL 芯片或一个 Microchip/Atmel PLD 芯片。）

The Signetics 82S100 sold reasonably well and was even designed into Commodore’s personal computers, including the Commodore 64. (The programmed 82S100 FPLAs in Commodore 64 computers now seem to be failing after nearly four decades in the field. The problem is sufficiently widespread to have given rise to several replacement designs built on a daughterboard using one 27C512 EPROM, a pair of PALs, or one Microchip/Atmel PLD.)

然而，Signetics 82S100并非首款FPLA。Intersil在Signetics推出82S100前一两个月就推出了功能类似的IM5200 FPLA。尽管两款FPLA的产品术语数量相同（均为48个），但82S100的速度大约是IM5200的两倍，并且多了两个输入引脚。Intersil的FPLA几乎瞬间就被淘汰了。我确信Intersil对这样的局面并不满意。

However, the Signetics 82S100 wasn’t the first FPLA. Intersil introduced the functionally similar IM5200 FPLA a month or two before Signetics introduced the 82S100. Although the two FPLAs had the same number of product terms (48), the 82S100 was about twice as fast as the IM5200, and had two additional input pins. Intersil’s FPLA was more or less obsoleted instantly. I am sure Intersil was less than thrilled about this turn of events.

82S100 FPLA 的成功促使 Signetics 公司基于相同的技术，扩展了产品线，推出了更多 PLD 产品。然而，82S100 设计提供的完全可编程 AND 和 OR 阵列的灵活性也带来了代价。芯片尺寸较大，导致器件价格相对较高，这也为功能稍逊但价格更低的替代方案创造了机会。这个替代方案就是 Monolithic Memories Inc (MMI) 的 PAL（可编程阵列逻辑）系列。它即将面世，但尚未正式发布。

The 82S100 FPLA was successful enough to encourage Signetics to expand the family with many more PLDs based on the same technology. However, the flexibility of fully programmable AND and OR arrays provided by the 82S100’s design came at a cost, literally. The die was large, which made the device relatively expensive and created an opportunity for a slightly less capable, less expensive alternative. That alternative was the PAL (programmable array logic) family from Monolithic Memories Inc (MMI). It would appear shortly, but not quite yet.

准备参加 PALs 考试

Preparing for PALs

约翰·伯克纳在加利福尼亚州优胜美地国家公园附近的一座金矿长大。在他六岁那年，他的父亲迷上了淘金，举家从南加州搬到这里去挖金矿。约翰从小就对电子产品着迷，后来成为了一名工程师。

John Birkner grew up living in a gold mine near Yosemite National Park in California. His father had caught the gold bug when Birkner was six years old and moved the family up from southern California to mine for gold. John got hooked on electronics early and became an engineer.

最终，伯克纳开始为位于加州尔湾的计算机自动化公司设计一系列名为“裸机微型计算机”（Naked Minicomputers 或简称“裸机迷你计算机”）的微型计算机。正是在那时，他开始大量使用 TTL 芯片，并逐渐了解了它们的局限性。同时，由于他在 CPU 设计中采用了 MMI 的小型双极型 PROM，他也开始熟悉 MMI。这些 PROM 芯片在当时深受逻辑设计师的青睐，因为它们速度快且支持现场编程，从而可以快速修改设计。

Eventually, Birkner started designing a line of minicomputers, called Naked Minicomputers or “Naked Minis,” for Computer Automation in Irvine, California. That’s when he started using TTL chips extensively, and that’s when he started to learn about their limitations. He also became familiar with MMI at this time because he incorporated MMI’s small bipolar PROMs in his CPU designs. These PROMs were a favorite for logic designers during this period because they were fast and they were field-programmable, which permitted fast design changes.

Signetics公司也曾试图凭借其82S100 FPLA处理器打入伯克纳的微型计算机设计领域。Signetics的FPLA处理器本应与伯克纳的微型计算机设计完美契合。然而，由于几个根本性的工程原因，事实并非如此。正如伯克纳在一次口述历史中解释的那样：

Signetics was also trying to get into Birkner’s minicomputer designs with its 82S100 FPLA. The Signetics FPLA should have been a perfect fit for Birkner’s minicomputer designs. It wasn’t, for several fundamental engineering reasons. As Birkner explains in an oral history:

“……我实在无法接受那么高的成本、那么大的数据包，而且传播延迟也不够快。不行，我没做。但后来我突然想到，‘哦，也许我应该上去告诉他们需要什么！’”

“… I just couldn’t justify the cost, the size of those big packages, and the propagation delay was not fast enough. Nope, didn’t do it. But it kind of gelled, ‘Oh, maybe I should go up there and tell them what they need!'”

伯克纳很快就有机会“告诉他们需要什么”。事实上，他将扮演重要角色，并最终推动现场可编程逻辑发展的下一个进化步骤，这将在本系列文章的第三部分中讨论，下周发布。

Birkner would soon get the chance to “tell them what they need.” In fact, he’d play a major role and would end up driving the next evolutionary step in the development of field-programmable logic, as will be discussed in Part 3 of this article series, next week.

 

 

参考：

References:

Signetics FPLF 口述历史小组，计算机历史博物馆，2009 年 9 月 15 日。

Signetics FPLF Oral History Panel, Computer History Museum, September 15, 2009.

约翰·伯克纳口述历史，计算机历史博物馆，2016 年 3 月 29 日。

Oral History of John Birkner, Computer History Museum, March 29, 2016.

Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 22V10 可编程阵列逻辑 (PAL) 开发团队口述历史小组，计算机历史博物馆，2012 年 7 月 19 日。

Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 22V10 Programmable Array Logic (PAL) Development Team Oral History Panel, Computer History Museum, July 19, 2012.

Stanley P. Frankel，“简单通用计算机的逻辑设计”，载于 IRE 电子计算机学报，第 EC-6 卷，第 1 期，第 5-14 页，1957 年 3 月，doi：10.1109/TEC.1957.5221555。

Stanley P. Frankel, “The Logical Design of a Simple General Purpose Computer,” in IRE Transactions on Electronic Computers, vol. EC-6, no. 1, pp. 5-14, March 1957, doi: 10.1109/TEC.1957.5221555.

CP Clare，《使用状态机设计逻辑系统》，McGraw-Hill Inc，1973 年。

C. P. Clare, Designing Logic Systems Using State Machines, McGraw-Hill Inc, 1973.

FPGA的诞生（第三部分）：MMI的PAL开启了可编程逻辑的大门

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 3 MMI’s PALs Opened the Flood Gates for Programmable Logic

本系列文章的第二部分探讨了首款成功的可编程逻辑器件——Signetics 82S100 FPLA（现场可编程逻辑阵列）的研发历程。Signetics 的一位销售人员试图说服加州尔湾计算机自动化公司（Computer Automation）的微型计算机设计师约翰·伯克纳（John Birkner）在他的设计中使用 82S100，但伯克纳认为这款器件成本过高、体积过大、速度过慢。他决定亲自前往硅谷，向集成电路供应商们阐明问题。

Part 2 of this article series discussed the development of the first successful programmable logic device, the Signetics 82S100 FPLA (field programmable logic array). A Signetics salesperson tried to convince John Birkner, a minicomputer designer at Computer Automation in Irvine, California, to use the 82S100 in his designs, but Birkner saw that the device was too costly, too big, and too slow. He thought he should go to Silicon Valley to set the IC vendors straight.

约翰·伯克纳很快就获得了“亲自去告诉他们他们的需求”的机会。由于感到需要换工作，伯克纳租了一架破旧的塞斯纳180飞机，从尔湾飞往加利福尼亚州的圣何塞，在那里他分别面试了AMD和MMI两家公司。飞机在整个飞行过程中都漏油，伯克纳不得不几次降落并给油冷却器加注机油，但他最终还是勉强抵达了圣何塞。两家公司都向他抛出了橄榄枝。伯克纳最终选择了MMI。

John Birkner soon got the chance to “go up there and tell them what they need.” Feeling the need for a job change, Birkner rented a janky Cessna 180 and flew himself up from Irvine to San Jose, California where he interviewed with AMD and MMI. The plane lost oil during the entire trip and Birkner had to land and refill the oil cooler a few times, but he made it to San Jose. Barely. Both companies made offers. Birkner chose MMI.

最终，伯克纳在MMI的老板克莱夫·格斯特要求伯克纳考虑如何利用MMI用于可编程只读存储器（PROM）的钛钨熔丝技术来制造可编程逻辑阵列芯片（FPLA）。（MMI曾试图成为Signetics 82S100 FPLA的第二供应商，但由于MMI的钛钨熔丝的电阻远高于Signetics使用的镍铬合金熔丝，因此无法与82S100的掩模级设计兼容。在现有的编程电压下，它们无法被熔断。）

Eventually, Birkner’s boss at MMI, Clive Ghest, asked Birkner to consider how MMI could harness its titanium-tungsten fuse technology, used in the company’s PROMs, to make FPLAs. (MMI attempted to become a second source for the Signetics 82S100 FPLA, but MMI’s titanium-tungsten fuses would not work with the 82S100’s mask-level design because they exhibited much higher resistance than the nichrome fuses that Signetics used. They could not be blown open by the available programming voltages.)

在伯克纳的口述历史中，他解释了在盖斯特提出请求后他的思考过程：

In his oral history, Birkner explains his thought process after Ghest’s request:

“……那时我的思路开始运转起来。我运用了我所有设计 TTL 的经验，还有那本 7400 系列的 TTL 金书（德州仪器出品）——几百种不同的元件我都牢记在心——因为我们必须解决 PC 板上的那些难题——我们该如何速成——当根本无法最小化时，我们该如何进行布尔最小化？”

“…that’s when the wheels started to turn. Taking all my experience designing TTL, having the 7400 gold book of TTL [from Texas Instruments] – a few hundred different components all memorized in my head – because we had to work out those puzzles on the PC board – how do we cram – how do we do Boolean minimization when you really can’t minimize?

“你手头只有这些预先配置好的芯片。比如……四个双输入与非门，或者两个四输入与门。或者还有一些或门。除了动脑筋，你真的没办法减少电路板上的芯片数量。”

“You’ve just got these chips that are already preconfigured. You’ve got … four two-input NANDs, or two four-input ANDs. Or they’ve got some ORs. And you really couldn’t minimize, except with your brain, your head, to minimize the number of chips on the board.

“有一天我突然想到，这本包含 7400 个 TTL 组合和时序电路的书，其实可以装进几个芯片里。我当时就想到了。所有这些与门和或门，都可以塞进这个 PLA 芯片里。”

“It just struck me one day, this whole book of 7400 TTL combinational and sequential circuits could be put in a few chips. It just struck me. All these AND gates and OR gates, they can just be crammed into this PLA.

“嗯，我之前就想到PLA可以实现这个功能。但我从来没有被委派过这样的任务：什么样的产品才能真正满足计算机设计师的需求？我之前是一名计算机设计师，了解空间、成本和性能方面的要求。而且，现在我也了解了PROM，了解了PROM的架构……我画出了PROM的架构图，也画出了FPLA的架构图。我画出了所有的小保险丝，用X表示所有的小连接。你看，这两个架构……成本太高，性能太低。”

“Well, I already had the concept that a PLA could do that. But I have never been given the task of, well, what would be a good product that computer designers would use? So I was fresh from being a computer designer knowing the needs of space, and cost, and performance. And also now knowing PROMs, knowing the architecture of the PROMs… I drew the architectures of a PROM. And I drew the architecture of an FPLA. And I drew all the little fuses. I used X’s for all the little connections. And you look at those two architectures… the cost of this was too much. The performance was too low.

“如果我把这个PROM芯片翻转一下呢？我把与门阵列改成或门阵列，把或门阵列改成与门阵列。这算是这两种架构的混合体。然后我在中间画出了新的PAL架构……这真的让那些想了解的人很感兴趣。他们能看到PROM架构，能看到FPLA架构，还能看到这个新东西！”

“What if I just took this PROM and flipped it? I made the AND-array be the OR-array, and the OR-array be the AND-array. It was kind of a hybrid between these two architectures. And I drew this new PAL architecture in the center… And that really gelled with people who wanted to understand. They could see the PROM architecture. They could see the FPLA architecture, and they could see this new thing!

“而且这种新产品速度快、价格便宜、体积小。”

“And this new thing was fast, cheap and small.”

伯克纳意识到，他可以舍弃FPLA的部分可编程功能，用一个可编程的与门阵列和一个固定的或门阵列（将所有与门项组合在一起）来设计芯片，这样就能得到一款芯片，它能完成FPLA的大部分功能，而且速度更快、成本更低。逻辑设计师稍加改进，就能让PAL芯片实现FPLA几乎所有功能，而且速度更快、功耗更低、成本更低。这正是设计师梦寐以求的工程权衡。当他们成功地在价格/功耗/性能（PPP）曲线的三个维度上都朝着正确的方向前进时，他们会感到无比自豪。

Birkner had realized that he could toss out some of the FPLA’s programmable capabilities, and with a programmable AND array and a fixed OR array that combined all of the AND terms, he’d get a chip that could do most of what the FPLA could do, but it would be faster and cheaper. With a little extra work by the logic designer, PALs could be made to do almost anything that an FPLA could do, but faster, with less power consumption, and at lower cost. That’s exactly the kind of engineering tradeoff that designers lust to make. They feel smart when they successfully move in the right direction along all three dimensions of the price/power/performance (PPP) curve.

下图所示为 MMI 16L8 PAL 的原理图。与 82S100 FPLA（参见本系列文章的第二部分）一样，PAL 在每行和每列的交叉点处都有一个保险丝，这些保险丝在原理图中未显示。同样与 82S100 类似，这些不需要的保险丝在编程过程中都会熔断：

A schematic diagram of an MMI 16L8 PAL appears below. As with the 82S100 FPLA (see Part 2 of this article series), the PAL has a fuse at every row and column intersection that does not appear on the schematic. Also like the 82S100, the unneeded fuses are all blown open during programming:

1978年3月，MMI在《电子设计》杂志上刊登了一则两页的广告，推出了其全新PAL系列的首批产品。该系列产品具有不同的输入输出组合，部分产品带有输出寄存器或锁存器。MMI将所有首批PAL系列器件都封装在20引脚的细长塑料DIP封装中，如下图所示。

MMI introduced the first members of its new PAL family in March, 1978, in a 2-page ad in Electronic Design magazine. Family members featured different mixes of inputs and outputs, with and without output registers or latches. MMI packaged all of the initial PAL family devices in 20-pin skinny plastic DIPs, as shown in the image below.

MMI公司最初将PAL系列的所有器件都封装在20引脚的超薄塑料DIP封装中。图片来源：Michael Holly 

MMI packaged all of the initial PAL family devices in 20-pin skinny plastic DIPs. Photo Credit: Michael Holly 

PAL器件迅速风靡，原因正如伯克纳所预料的那样。它们速度极快，可以直接替代几层TTL门电路。功耗极低，不会成为问题。虽然成本没有MMI公司预期的那么低，但也足够低，设计工程师在决定使用它们时只会稍作犹豫。

PALs became wildly popular, quickly, for all the reasons that Birkner had foreseen. They were fast enough to replace a couple of layers of TTL gates directly. Power consumption was low enough to not be a problem. And the cost, while not as low as MMI had wanted, was low enough to give design engineers only a momentary pause when deciding to use them.

PAL 的最大优势或许并非体现在 PPP 工程曲线上。PAL 通过允许将部分设计推迟到项目后期，从而降低了设计风险。当需求不明确或出现其他设计不确定性时，通过在设计中引入 PAL，可以将电路该部分的设计决策推迟到电路板制造完成后很久。

Perhaps the biggest advantage that PALs offered could not be found on the PPP engineering curve. PALs reduced design risk by allowing a design to defer part of a design until later in the project. By dropping a PAL into a design when requirements weren’t clear or when other forms of design uncertainty crept in, the design decisions for that portion of the circuit could be postponed until long after the circuit board was fabricated.

当电路板从PCB车间送回并开始调试时，工程师只需烧录一个新的PAL芯片并将其插入电路板，即可在几分钟内完成设计变更以修复缺陷。当然，成功使用此功能取决于设计工程师预测设计缺陷可能出现位置的能力。这就是需要将PAL芯片插入电路的位置。

When the boards came back from the pcb shop and debugging began, engineers could develop design changes to fix bugs in minutes, simply by blowing a new PAL and plugging it into the board. Of course, successfully using this feature depends on the design engineer’s skill in predicting where design bugs might show up. That’s where you wanted to drop a PAL into the circuit.

如今，电路板设计可以通过互联网即时发送给PCB制造商，成品电路板最快第二天就能到货，因此这项“功能”看起来似乎没什么优势。但在20世纪70年代末和80年代初，电路板制造需要数周时间，而不是一两天。所以，在设计中加入PAL模块，可以为最终确定PAL模块所包含部分的设计要求提供数周的缓冲时间。设计师们充分利用了这项功能（我也经常这样做），并逐渐依赖PAL模块来防范设计风险。

This “feature” might not seem like much of an advantage today, when a circuit board design can be sent to a pcb fabricator over the Internet instantly, and a fabricated board can arrive as early as the next day, but in the late 1970s and early 1980s, board fabrication took weeks, not a day or two. So dropping a PAL into the design provided weeks of breathing room on finalizing design requirements for the portion of the design that would fit into the PAL. Designers used this feature to their advantage, a lot (I did), and grew to depend on PALs for added insurance against design risks.

伯克纳还投入大量精力推广PAL（同伴辅助学习系统）。在他的口述历史中，他特别提到了MMI PAL手册的编写工作，这本手册是当时PAL的主要营销工具。以下是手册中对MMI PAL的描述（注：文中特意保留了当时的性别代词。毕竟这是20世纪70年代的历史！我只是在复述，而不是改写。）：

Birkner also devoted a lot of effort to marketing PALs. In his oral history, he especially notes the work that went into the development of MMI’s PAL handbook, which was the primary marketing tool for PALs at the time. Here’s how the handbook described MMI’s PALs (Note: gender-specific pronouns from the era have been preserved, intentionally. It’s history from the 1970s, folks! I’m recounting it, not rewriting it.):

PAL是Monolithic Memories公司首创的熔丝连接技术的延伸，该技术最初用于双极型PROM。熔丝连接PROM首次赋予了数字系统设计人员“在硅片上写入数据”的能力。只需几秒钟，他们就能将一个空白的通用PROM器件转换为包含自定义算法、微程序或布尔转换函数的器件。这为PROM在计算机控制存储器、字符生成器、数据存储表以及许多其他应用中的使用开辟了新的前景。如今价值数百万美元的PROM市场清楚地表明了这项技术的广泛应用。

“The PAL is an extension of the fusible link technology pioneered by Monolithic Memories for use in bi-polar PROMs. The fusible link PROM first gave the digital systems designer the power to “write on silicon.” In a few seconds he was able to transform a blank PROM from a general purpose device into one containing a custom algorithm, microprogram, or Boolean transfer function. This opened up new horizons for the use of PROMs in computer control stores, character generators, data storage tables and many other applications. The wide acceptance of this technology is clearly demonstrated by today’s multi-million dollar PROM market.

PROM成功的关键在于它允许设计人员快速轻松地定制芯片以满足其独特的需求。PAL利用成熟的熔丝连接技术来实现逻辑功能，从而扩展了这种可编程的灵活性。使用PAL电路，设计人员可以快速有效地实现各种复杂度的自定义逻辑，从随机门到复杂的算术函数，应有尽有。

“The key to the PROM’s success is that it allows the designer to quickly and easily customize the chip to fit his unique requirements. The PAL extends this programmable flexibility by utilizing proven fusible link technology to implement logic functions. Using PAL circuits the designer can quickly and effectively implement custom logic varying in complexity from random gates to complex arithmetic functions.”

PAL 制式计算机风靡一时，甚至成为特雷西·基德 (Tracy Kidder) 畅销书《新机器的灵魂》(The Soul of a New Machine ) 的主角。基德的这本书描述了数据通用公司 (DG) Eclipse MV/8000 小型计算机（代号“鹰”）的研发历程，该研发大约发生在 1978 年。这本书于 1981 年出版，并在次年荣获普利策奖。Eclipse MV/8000 是 DG 的首款 32 位小型计算机，旨在与数字设备公司 (Digital Equipment Corp) 的“类别杀手”VAX 计算机直接竞争。尽管是 32 位机器，DG Eclipse MV/8000 却能向下兼容该公司早期的 16 位小型计算机，无需单独的 16 位和 32 位操作模式。这种向下兼容性的实现颇具挑战性，但对 DG 的现有客户而言却至关重要。

PALs became so popular that they starred in Tracy Kidder’s best-selling book, “The Soul of a New Machine.” Kidder’s book describes the development of the Data General (DG) Eclipse MV/8000 minicomputer (code named “Eagle”), which occurred around 1978. The book appeared in 1981 and won a Pulitzer Prize the following year. The Eclipse MV/8000 was DG’s first 32-bit minicomputer, designed to compete directly against Digital Equipment Corp’s category killer, the VAX. Although a 32-bit machine, the DG Eclipse MV/8000 was backward-compatible with the company’s earlier 16-bit minicomputers, without needing separate 16- and 32-bit operating modes. This backward compatibility proved tricky to accomplish, but it was oh, so valuable to DG’s existing customers.

汤姆·韦斯特是DG公司Eagle设计团队的负责人，在基德的书中扮演着核心角色。以下是基德对汤姆·韦斯特决定使用PAL制式的描述：

Tom West managed the Eagle design team at DG and plays the central role in Kidder’s book. Here’s how Kidder describes Tom West’s decision to use PALs:

为了寻求技术优势，韦斯特孤注一掷，认为芯片领域未来的发展方向是一种名为PAL的电路。集成电路的制造是一项风险极高的行业；据说工厂可能会突然无故停产——尽管少量灰尘的流入是常见的嫌疑对象。因此，人们普遍认为，在制造一台新电脑时，除非至少有两家公司都在生产某种新型芯片，否则绝不会考虑使用它。当时，只有一家规模较小的公司在生产PAL芯片。但如果PAL芯片真的是未来的发展方向，那么使用它们将是一个明智之举。韦斯特决定这样做。

“Looking for a technical advantage, West gambled that the coming thing in chips was a type of circuit known as a PAL. The manufacture of integrated circuits is a fairly risky business; it is said that factories can suddenly become inoperative for no apparent reason — though a small infusion of dust is a common suspect. So the conventional wisdom holds that in making a new computer, you never plan on using any sort of brand-new chip unless at least two companies are making it. At that moment, only one fairly small company was making PALs. But if PALs really were the coming thing, it would be a win to use them. West decided to do so.”

注意韦斯特不愿使用单一供应商的器件。工程师们每天都会面临这类设计决策。最终，美国国家半导体公司、AMD、雷神公司和德州仪器公司都成为了MMI PAL芯片的第二或备选供应商。就连Signetics公司最终也妥协了，在其产品线中添加了PAL芯片。

Note West’s reluctance to use single-source devices. Engineers face this sort of design decision daily. Eventually, National Semiconductor, AMD, Raytheon, and Texas Instruments all became second or alternate sources for MMI’s PALs. Even Signetics finally caved in and added PALs to its product line.

到了 20 世纪 70 年代末，现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的发展势头迅猛。从 1978 年开始，MMI 公司的 PAL 芯片销量连续六年翻番。1982 年，也就是 MMI 将 PAL 芯片引入工程界仅仅四年后，我就开始在 Cadnetix 公司为工程工作站设计的电路板中使用该公司生产的 16L8 PAL 芯片。而且用量很大。正如系统级项目常见的情况一样，在我们需要将电路板设计稿发送到 PCB 车间时，工作站的部分设计尚未完全确定，因此我会在设计不确定的地方策略性地添加 PAL 芯片。我会在成品电路板从生产车间返回很久之后才开始完善 PAL 芯片的配置。我广泛使用 PAL 芯片来解码地址和设置内存管理单元中的页面大小。所以，根据我的个人经验，我可以肯定地说，这种以 PAL 芯片为中心的设计策略在当时非常有效。（如今情况已大不相同，因为我们拥有了更先进的仿真工具。）

By the end of the 1970s, field-programmable devices were on a roll. Starting in 1978, sales of MMI’s PALs doubled every year for six years in a row. In 1982, just four years after MMI introduced PALs to the engineering community, I started using the company’s 16L8 PALs in my circuit board designs for engineering workstations at Cadnetix. Lots of them. As is typical with system-level projects, portions of the workstations’ designs were not fully defined by the time we needed to send the board designs to the pcb shop, so I dropped PALs into strategic locations wherever the design was uncertain. I’d develop the PAL configurations long after the finished boards returned from the manufacturing shop. I used PALs extensively for decoding addresses and to set page sizes within a memory management unit. So, from personal experience, I can say this PAL-centric design strategy worked very well, back then. (It’s a different story today because we have far better simulation tools.)

PAL芯片也被证明在生成早期DRAM所需的精确的行地址和列地址选通（RAS和CAS）信号方面非常有用。我在20世纪80年代就使用过PAL芯片来实现这一功能，我的朋友Ahmad Ghaemmaghami也一样。他在80年代为富士通工作期间，使用MMI PAL芯片设计并制造了一个简单的DRAM测试仪。这块电路板上的20引脚16R8 PAL芯片是MMI PAL系列的早期成员之一，带有寄存器输出，位于电路板左上角白色方形按钮的右侧。它负责生成RAS和CAS信号的时序以及DRAM所需的周期性刷新信号。

PALs also turned out to be useful for generating the finicky row and column address strobe (RAS and CAS) signals needed to operate early DRAMs. I certainly used PALs for this application in the 1980s, as did my friend Ahmad Ghaemmaghami, who designed and built a simple DRAM tester using an MMI PAL while working for Fujitsu during the 1980s. The 20-pin 16R8 PAL on this board, one of the original MMI PAL family members with registered outputs, which is located just to the right of the square, white pushbutton in the upper left quadrant of the board, generated RAS and CAS signal timing and the periodic refresh cycles required by the DRAMs.

下面这张图是 Ghaemmaghami 的单板 DRAM 测试仪。

A photo of Ghaemmaghami’s single-board DRAM tester appears below.

这款由 Ahmad Ghaemmaghami 为富士通设计的基于 PAL 制式的 DRAM 测试板，是为测试 256Kbit 和 1Mbit DRAM 而开发的。它可以执行“全 1”、“全 0”、棋盘格和反向棋盘格内存测试。

This PAL-based DRAM test board designed by Ahmad Ghaemmaghami for Fujitsu was developed to test 256Kbit and 1Mbit DRAMs. It could perform “all-ones,” “all-zeroes,” checkerboard, and inverse-checkerboard memory tests.

Ghaemmaghami 的电路板是 20 世纪 80 年代中期逻辑设计的一个绝佳范例。它将许多廉价的 TTL MSI 和 SSI 芯片与一到几个 PAL 芯片巧妙地结合使用，用于那些由于某种原因无法使用 TTL 设计的情况。值得注意的是，该电路板上没有微处理器或微控制器。如今，35 年过去了，你很可能可以用一个廉价的微控制器来替换电路板上的所有芯片。

Ghaemmaghami’s board is an excellent example of logic design in the mid 1980s. It mixes many inexpensive TTL MSI and SSI chips with one or a few PALs, used strategically where a TTL design just won’t work for one reason or another. Note that there’s no microprocessor or microcontroller on this board. Today, 35 years later, you could likely replace all of the chips on the board with one inexpensive microcontroller.

MMI 的 PAL 器件基于多种集成电路制造技术和测试方法，其技术可追溯到哈里斯半导体公司在 20 世纪 60 年代推出的现场可编程二极管矩阵 (FPGA)，为系统设计人员打开了可编程逻辑的大门。但这些器件并非现场可编程逻辑的最终发展阶段，甚至远非如此。接下来的两个发展阶段——复杂可编程逻辑器件 (CPLD) 和现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA)——即将出现。

MMI’s PALs, which were based on a number of IC fabrication technologies and testing methods going all the way back to Harris Semiconductor’s field-programmable diode matrices introduced in the 1960s, opened the programmable-logic flood gates for system designers. But these devices weren’t the final evolutionary step for field-programmable logic. Not even close. The next two rungs on the evolutionary ladder, CPLDs (complex programmable logic devices) and FPGAs, would appear shortly.

 

 

参考：

References:

约翰·伯克纳口述历史，计算机历史博物馆，2016 年 3 月 29 日。

Oral History of John Birkner, Computer History Museum, March 29, 2016.

 

 

FPGA的起源（第四部分）：EPLD和CPLD是PAL之后的产物，也是PLD的下一个发展阶段。

How the FPGA came to be, Part 4 EPLDs and CPLDs Followed PALs, and Were the Next Evolutionary Step for PLDs

到 20 世纪 70 年代末，PAL 已成为系统设计人员首选的 PLD（可编程逻辑器件）。对于 Monolithic Memories Inc (MMI) 而言，PAL 是一款极其成功的产品。同时，对于其他所有想要进入 PLD 领域的集成电路制造商来说，PAL 也是一个极具吸引力的目标。许多制造商也确实这样做了。 

By the end of the 1970s, PALs had become the PLD (programmable logic device) of choice for system designers. They were an immensely successful product for Monolithic Memories Inc (MMI). They were also a great target for every other IC maker that wanted to enter the PLD arena. Several did just that. 

鲍勃·哈特曼于1980年联合创立了Source III咨询公司。这家咨询公司专注于门阵列的设计，因为20世纪80年代初无疑是门阵列发展的黄金时期。当时主要的门阵列供应商——包括LSI Logic、Signetics、Intersil、AMI和富士通——提供主芯片和工具。客户需要使用供应商提供的工具进行设计。Source III则扮演着经验丰富的中间人的角色。鉴于开发门阵列的难度、非经常性工程成本以及所需时间，这项工作促使哈特曼和他的咨询顾问同事们思考，是否存在一种PLD（脉冲激光二极管）可以替代部分正在开发的门阵列的市场。

Bob Hartmann co-founded Source III in 1980. The consultancy specialized in the design of gate arrays, because the early 1980s was definitely a golden time for gate-array development. The major gate-array vendors of the day – including LSI Logic, Signetics, Intersil, AMI, and Fujitsu – provided master slices and tools. It was the customer’s job to create the design using the vendor’s tools. Source III acted as an experienced intermediary. This work prompted Hartmann and his fellow consultants to wonder if there wasn’t an available niche for a PLD to replace some of the gate arrays being developed, given the difficulty, NRE expense, and time needed to develop a gate array.

在计算机历史博物馆对几位创始人及早期 Altera 员工（陈耀辉、罗伯特·弗兰科维奇、罗伯特·哈特曼、克莱夫·麦卡锡和唐·黄）进行的口述历史采访中，哈特曼描述了促成 Altera 于 1983 年成立的思考过程：

In an oral history taken by the Computer History Museum with several founders and early Altera employees – Yiu-Fai Chan, Robert Frankovich, Robert Hartmann, Clive McCarthy, and Don Wong – Hartmann described the thought process that resulted in the founding of Altera in 1983:

“在做了几年之后，我们发现这种设计系统存在诸多问题，比如难以实现，以及为了制造特定类型的零件而必须定制掩模组的成本等等。在我们撰写的一本调查报告中，我们萌生了一个想法：如果有人能发明一种制造完成后可编程的通用逻辑器件，那该有多好啊！我们觉得这将彻底改变行业格局。所以，之后我们就想，‘嘿，我们何不试试朝这个方向发展呢？’于是我们就这么做了。”

“Having done that for a couple of years, then seeing how the problems of making that kind of design system work, and the difficulties of it, and the cost of having to produce custom mask sets, to do a particular part type, all of these problems. We had the notion, in a survey book that we wrote, wouldn’t it be wonderful, basically, if somebody could come up with something that is programmable after it was manufactured to do general-purpose logic. We felt that it would be a game-changer. So, subsequent to that, we said, ‘Hey, why don’t we see if we can launch off in this direction?’ And that’s what we did.”

哈特曼在公司首轮融资中筹集了75万美元，用于启动Altera项目。这笔钱不足以完成芯片设计，但足以让公司起步。风险投资家希望Altera开发一款测试芯片。而哈特曼则希望一开始就推出一款能够直接与市面上一些门阵列芯片竞争的大型设计。罗伯特·弗兰科维奇曾在20世纪70年代于仙童半导体公司工作时结识了哈特曼，后来加入了哈特曼的Altera公司。他认为Altera的首个设计应该是一款可以销售的最小可行产品：既不是测试芯片（因为设计测试芯片几乎需要与实际产品相同的精力，最终也只能验证概念），也不是大型PLD芯片。

Hartmann raised $750,000 to start Altera in the company’s first funding round. That wasn’t enough money to get a chip design, but it was enough to make a start. The venture capitalists wanted Altera to develop a test chip. Hartmann wanted to leave the starting gate with a large design that could directly compete with some of the gate arrays on the market. Robert Frankovich, who’d met Hartmann while working at Fairchild Semiconductor in the 1970s and had subsequently joined Hartmann’s Altera, felt that Altera’s first design should be a minimum viable product that could be sold: not a test chip, which would take nearly the same effort to design as an actual product and would result in nothing more than a proof of concept, but not a large PLD either.

弗兰科维奇赢得了这场争论，并开始审视市场，寻找一款“杀手级应用”，一个成功且容易下手的目标，以便从中抢占市场份额。当时，市场上最成功的PLD系列无疑是MMI的20引脚PAL系列（本系列文章第三部分将对此进行详细讨论），因此，PAL自然而然地成为了Altera首款PLD设计的主要目标。

Frankovich won the argument and surveyed the landscape, looking for a “killer app,” a successful, easy target that they could steal business from. At the time, the most successful PLD family on the market, by far, was MMI’s 20-pin PAL family (extensively discussed in Part 3 of this article series), so of course, PALs became the primary target for Altera’s first PLD design.

与1983年市场上其他成功的PLD一样，MMI的PAL采用了双极型技术和金属熔丝编程，从而实现了最快的器件速度。Altera则希望另辟蹊径。Frankovich深知并非所有人都追求极致速度。他也明白，由于功耗和散热问题，双极型技术无法扩展到更大的器件。Altera的首款PLD将与PAL展开竞争，但后续器件将与门阵列竞争，因此需要大幅提升器件尺寸。

Like the other successful PLDs on the market in 1983, MMI’s PALs employed bipolar technology with metal fuse programming, which resulted in the fastest parts. Altera wanted to take a different direction. Frankovich knew that not everyone wanted the fastest possible part. He also knew that bipolar technology wouldn’t scale to larger devices because of the power consumption and heat dissipation. Altera’s first PLD would compete with PALs, but subsequent devices would compete with gate arrays and would therefore need to grow much larger.

Altera团队为其首款PLD选择了CMOS EPROM工艺作为实现技术，这与采用金属熔丝编程的双极型集成电路相比，可谓是天壤之别。这种工艺技术的选择带来了多项优势：

Altera’s team chose a CMOS EPROM process as the implementation technology for its first PLD, which was about as radical a departure from a bipolar IC with metal-fuse programming as you could get. This choice of process technology had multiple benefits:

  •         它可以用来制造更大的设备。
  •         It could be used to make far bigger devices
  •         它是可擦除的
  •         It was erasable
  •         它消耗的电量要少得多。
  •         It would draw far less power

制造更大尺寸器件的能力将使 Altera 能够进军目前由门阵列占据的市场。可擦除性意味着系统设计师（比如我）的工作台上不会再堆满装满昂贵废旧 PLD 的纸杯，时刻提醒他们设计错误会造成经济损失。当然，每个人都喜欢更低的功耗。唯一的缺点是传播延迟较慢，这意味着 Altera 的 PLD 无法解决所有人的设计难题。然而，没有哪款集成电路能够做到这一点。

The ability to make larger devices would allow Altera to chase the market currently served by gate arrays. Erasability meant that systems designers (like me) would not end up with a paper cup full of expensive, used PLDs on their bench to serve as a reminder that design errors cost money. And of course, everyone likes lower power consumption. The one drawback, slower propagation delays, meant that Altera’s PLDs would not solve everyone’s design problems. However, no IC ever does.

当时，拥有CMOS EPROM制造工艺的芯片制造商寥寥无几。唯一一家愿意与像Altera这样的小型初创公司合作，且拥有此类工艺的公司是日本的理光公司。因此，理光成为了Altera的首家晶圆代工厂，而Altera也颇有把握地宣称，它是首家真正意义上的无晶圆厂芯片供应商。

Very few chipmakers had a CMOS EPROM manufacturing process. The only company with such a process that was willing to work with a small startup like Altera was Ricoh, in Japan. So Ricoh became Altera’s first foundry, and Altera can claim with some authority that it was the first truly fabless chip vendor.

工艺技术只是第一个难关。第二个挑战是封装。EPROM 通常采用宽 DIP 封装，并带有石英窗口，以便紫外光能够进入封装内部擦除 EPROM 单元。由于 Altera 计划与 20 引脚 PAL 芯片竞争，因此需要一种带有石英窗口的纤薄 20 引脚封装。当时市面上并没有这样的封装，所以 Altera 不得不定制开发。

Process technology was only the first hurdle. The second challenge was packaging. EPROMs are packaged in wide DIPs with quartz windows to allow ultraviolet light to enter the package and erase the EPROM cells. Because Altera was planning on competing with 20-pin PALs, the company needed a skinny, 20-pin package with a quartz window. No such package existed at the time, so Altera had to get one tooled as a custom package.

Altera公司于1983年6月成立。同年圣诞节前，该公司就完成了首款PLD芯片EP300的流片：从设计到流片仅用了不到6个月的时间。EP300的开发团队由六名设计工程师（陈耀辉、索浩、罗伯特·哈特曼、吉姆·桑斯伯里、吴约翰和唐·王）和四名版图设计师（鲍勃·弗兰科维奇、马克·贝尔肖、苏珊·福克和凯西·霍普金斯）组成。在当时，这样的效率是可以实现的。只需召集几名工程师，在硅谷的一栋办公楼里安顿下来，设计芯片，完成流片，半年内就能开始制作掩模。那时候一切都简单得多。1984年7月，Altera推出了EP300 EPLD（可擦除PLD）。

Altera had opened its doors in June, 1983. The company had taped out its first PLD, the EP300, by Christmas of that year: less than 6 months to tape out the first chip. The EP300 development team consisted of six design engineers (Yiu-Fai Chan, Haugh Suo, Robert Hartmann, Jim Sansbury, John Oh, and Don Wong) and four layout designers (Bob Frankovich, Mark Belshaw, Susan Falk, and Kathy Hopkins). That’s the sort of thing that was possible back then. You could gather a handful of engineers, set up shop in a Silicon Valley office building, design a chip, tape it out, and be ready to make masks in half a year. Things were simpler back then. Altera introduced the EP300 EPLD (erasable PLD) in July, 1984.

当时，MMI 提供了七种不同的 20 引脚 PAL 芯片。一块 Altera EP300 芯片可以替代 MMI 所有 20 引脚 PAL 产品线，甚至更多。由于 MMI 的 PAL 芯片采用了模块化、可自由组合的设计，使用了多种不同的宏单元，因此您可以将同一块 Altera EP300 芯片编程为模拟 MMI 的七种 20 引脚 PAL 芯片中的任何一种。这些 PAL 宏单元中，有些包含 1 位输出寄存器，有些则不包含。您可以在 EP300 设计中混合搭配这些宏单元，创建 MMI 没有提供的 PAL 配置——所有这些都使用相同的 Altera EPLD 芯片。

At the time, MMI offered seven different versions of its 20-pin PALs. One Altera EP300 could replace all of the members of MMI’s 20-pin PAL product line, and more. You could program the same Altera EP300 to emulate any of the seven MMI 20-pin PALs, because MMI had designed its PALs in a modular, mix-and-match fashion using several different macrocells. Some of these PAL macrocells included 1-bit output registers and others did not. You could mix and match these macrocells in an EP300 design and create PAL configurations that MMI didn’t offer – all with the same Altera EPLD.

只要你不需要那么高的速度。CMOS EP300 的输入输出传播延迟为 90 纳秒。MMI 的双极 PAL 的速度是它的四倍以上。

As long as you didn’t need the speed. The CMOS EP300’s input-to-output propagation delay was 90 nanoseconds. MMI’s bipolar PALs were more than four times that fast.

事实证明，并非所有人都需要如此高的速度，Altera 的 EPLD 销量迅速增长。MMI 早已做好市场准备，Altera 的 EP300 也精准击中了目标市场。Altera 在成立两年内就开始产生正现金流，并有机会制造更大尺寸的器件，开始与门阵列展开竞争。Altera EP300 器件在八个宏单元中集成了约 300 个逻辑门。

As it turned out, not everyone needed the speed, and Altera quickly started selling lots of EPLDs. MMI had prepared the market and Altera’s EP300 hit its target dead center. Altera started generating positive cash flow within two years of its founding. It got the chance to build those bigger and bigger devices to start competing with gate arrays. The Altera EP300 device held about 300 gates worth of logic in eight macrocells.

MMI的PAL器件在市场上的成功引起了Altera的关注，同时也吸引了另一家竞争对手：莱迪思半导体（Lattice Semiconductor）。莱迪思半导体于1983年成立于俄勒冈州希尔斯伯勒，它也采用了与MMI PAL器件相同的架构，推出了GAL（通用阵列逻辑）16V8器件。与Altera一样，莱迪思也选择使用CMOS工艺制造其PAL替代产品。但与Altera不同的是，莱迪思选择了电可擦CMOS（E2CMOS ）工艺，该工艺能够提供更高的片上器件密度，并允许对器件进行电擦除。这一特性使得在发货前可以对制造完成的16V8器件进行100%的测试。莱迪思可以将多个测试图案加载到封装好的GAL器件中，然后在最终测试后将其完全擦除。

MMI’s market success with PALs attracted Altera’s attention, and it attracted another competitor: Lattice Semiconductor. Founded in Hillsboro, Oregon in 1983, Lattice also copied the MMI PAL device architectures with its GAL (Generic Array Logic) 16V8 device. Like Altera, Lattice chose to fabricate its PAL alternative using a CMOS process technology. Unlike Altera, Lattice chose an electrically erasable CMOS (E2CMOS) process that provided more on-chip device density and allowed the devices to be erased electrically. This feature permitted 100 percent testing of the manufactured 16V8 devices prior to shipping. Lattice could load the packaged GALs with multiple test patterns and then completely erase them after final testing.

Lattice 的 GAL 比 Altera 的 EP300 EPLD 快得多。其输入输出传播延迟仅为 15 纳秒，也比 MMI 的双极 PAL 快。（Lattice 在市场宣传资料中强调了这一点，并在《Lattice 通用阵列逻辑手册》每隔一页的底部显著位置印上了其应用热线电话号码 1-800-FASTGAL。 ）

Lattice’s GALs were significantly faster than Altera’s EP300 EPLD. With a 15 nanosecond input-to-output propagation delay, they were faster than MMI’s bipolar PALs, too. (Lattice emphasized this fact in marketing literature and with the phone number for its application hotline, 1-800-FASTGAL, prominently featured at the bottom of every other page in the Lattice Generic Array Logic Handbook.)

由于莱迪思采用CMOS工艺制造GAL，其功耗低于双极型PAL。与Altera的EP300 EPLD类似，一个20引脚的莱迪思GAL可以模拟MMI的任何一款20引脚PAL，从而减少了OEM系统供应商需要库存的空白器件数量。这对于GAL而言是一项降低成本的优势。凭借这些优势，莱迪思的GAL迅速在PAL市场占据了一席之地。

GALs consumed less power than bipolar PALs because Lattice made them using a CMOS process technology. Like Altera’s EP300 EPLD, one 20-pin Lattice GAL could emulate any of MMI’s 20-pin PALs, which reduced the number of blank devices an OEM system vendor needed to keep in inventory. That was a cost-reducing advantage for GALs. Because of all these advantages, Lattice’s GALs quickly gained market share in the PAL arena.

莱迪斯公司于1985年4月推出了GAL 16V8 PLD，距离Altera公司的EP300 EPLD上市不到一年。莱迪斯随即开始散布关于Altera公司策略的FUD（恐惧、不确定性和怀疑）。以下是1986年莱迪斯通用阵列逻辑手册中对一款基于紫外可擦除CMOS（UVCMOS）工艺技术的未具名竞争产品的描述：

Lattice introduced its GAL 16V8 PLD in April, 1985, less than a year after Altera’s EP300 EPLD hit the market, and Lattice immediately started spreading FUD (fear, uncertainty, and doubt) about Altera’s approach. Here’s what the 1986 Lattice Generic Array Logic Handbook had to say about an unnamed, competing product based on ultraviolet-erasable CMOS (UVCMOS) process technology:

“UVCMOS技术解决了双极型工艺的许多缺点，但同时也带来了自身的诸多缺点。这项技术所需的功耗要低得多，虽然它具备擦除功能，但代价是速度较慢且擦除过程繁琐。”

“UVCMOS addresses many of the shortcomings of the bipolar approach, but introduces many shortcomings of its own. This technology requires much lower power and, while it has the capability to erase, this comes at the expense of slower speeds and cumbersome erase procedures.”

基于恐惧、不确定和怀疑（FUD）的营销过去是、现在是、将来也可能永远是可编程逻辑控制器（PLC）营销的标志性特征。莱迪斯公司并非FUD的始作俑者。几十年来，FUD一直是技术营销的一部分，而在此之前的几十年里，它更是汽车营销的关键组成部分。

FUD-based marketing was, is, and likely will always be a hallmark of programmable logic marketing. Lattice didn’t invent FUD. It’s been a part of technology marketing for many decades, and a key component of automobile marketing for decades before that.

与此同时，AMD在1980年末或1981年初通过获得MMI的PAL芯片专利授权，成为了MMI PAL芯片的替代供应商。作为替代供应商是AMD的一项核心业务。由于协议仅限于专利使用权而非掩模，AMD利用自身的半导体技术设计了PAL芯片，并在MMI的芯片基础上进行了改进。例如，AMD没有像MMI在其原有PAL芯片和PROM芯片中使用钛钨熔丝，而是采用了源自其PROM芯片设计的更可靠的铂硅化物熔丝，从而提高了编程良率。虽然客户可以将编程失败的MMI PAL芯片退回工厂以获得退款，但这增加了成本，需要额外的会计工作，而且普遍令MMI的客户感到不满。AMD的销售人员利用了这一点，仅凭强调这一优势，就能够超越MMI的PAL芯片销量。

Meanwhile, AMD had become an alternate source for MMI’s PALs by licensing the PAL patents in late 1980 or early 1981. Being an alternate source was a bread-and-butter business for AMD. Because the agreement was for patent use, not masks, AMD designed its own PALs, using its own semiconductor technologies, and improved on MMI’s parts. For example, instead of using titanium-tungsten fuses, as MMI had in its original PALs and PROMs, AMD had a more reliable platinum silicide fuse from its own PROM designs, which improved programming yields. Although customers could return the MMI PALs that didn’t program correctly to the factory for credit, this process increased costs, required additional accounting effort, and it just irritated MMI’s customers in general. AMD’s salespeople exploited this situation and could outsell MMI just by emphasizing this one advantage over MMI’s PALs.

这种针对PAL芯片的替代供货方案，使得AMD的销售人员能够与众多PAL芯片用户交流，了解他们的需求。工程师们会拿出电路图，向AMD的销售人员详细展示他们如何使用现有芯片。他们会谈到PAL芯片的不足之处以及希望增加的功能。这是一次非常有效且深入的市场调研。

This alternate-source arrangement for PALs allowed AMD salespeople to speak with many PAL customers about their needs. Engineers would pull out their schematics and show AMD’s salespeople exactly how they were using the existing parts. They’d talk about the PALs’ shortcomings and the additional features they’d like to see. This was great, in-depth market research.

这项研究揭示的缺陷之一是工程师在使用基于 PAL 制程的设计时经常遇到的 PAL 输入输出引脚不足的问题。似乎无论选择哪种 PAL 制程，总会缺少一到两个输入或输出引脚。或者某个输出需要寄存器，但却没有配备。基于这项深入的市场调研，AMD 得以定义并开发出更大、更优秀的 PAL 制程——22V10。它仍然是双极型器件，但拥有更多的输入和输出引脚，并且集成了更多的输出宏单元（10 个，而非 8 个）。为了容纳更多的输入和输出引脚，22V10 采用更大的 24 引脚封装。

One of the shortcomings uncovered by this research was the continual shortage of PAL inputs and outputs that engineers experienced with their PAL-based designs. It seems that the chosen PAL, whichever was chosen, was always one or two input or output pins short. Or one of the outputs needed a register and didn’t have it. As a result of this grass-roots market research, AMD was able to define and develop a bigger, better PAL called the 22V10, which was still a bipolar part, but it had more input and output pins, and it incorporated more output macrocells (10 instead of 8). The 22V10 was packaged in a larger, 24-pin package to accommodate the additional input and output pins.

AMD 于 1983 年 6 月推出了 22V10，并迅速取得了成功。它采用 PAL 制式，因此用户并不陌生，但它又提供了工程师们梦寐以求的更多功能。为了应对 AMD 22V10 的推出，Altera 于 1985 年 7 月开发并发布了 EP600 EPLD。Altera EP600 模拟了 22V10 的 PAL 制式，就像引脚兼容的 EP300 模拟 MMI 的 20 针 PAL 制式一样。Altera 认为，成功或许会再次降临。（Lattice 也开发了 GAL 制式的 22V10。）

AMD introduced 22V10 in June, 1983 and it became an overnight success. It was familiar, because it was a PAL, but it offered that little bit more that engineers craved. Altera responded to AMD’s 22V10 introduction by developing and announcing the EP600 EPLD in July, 1985. The Altera EP600 emulated the 22V10 PAL in the same way that the pin-compatible EP300 emulated MMI’s 20-pin PALs. Altera figured lightning might just as well strike twice. (Lattice also developed a GAL 22V10.)

然而，EP600并非Altera的第二款EPLD。Altera于1984年10月推出了第二款EPLD——EP1200。EP1200在48个宏单元中集成了约1200个门电路，并采用40引脚DIP封装。更大的PLCC和PGA封装使得同一颗EP1200芯片能够支持更多的输入输出引脚。EP1200 EPLD的性能远远超越了任何PAL，朝着门阵列的方向迈进，但它是一款现场可编程器件。虽然它的门电路容量远小于任何门阵列，但它证明了Altera的发展方向是正确的。下图展示了安装在40引脚DIP封装中的Altera EP1200 EPLD。

However, the EP600 was not Altera’s second EPLD. Altera introduced its second EPLD, the EP1200, in October, 1984. The EP1200 packed about 1200 gates worth of logic in 48 macrocells and was packaged in a 40-pin DIP. Larger PLCC and PGA packages allowed the same EP1200 die to support even more input and output pins. The EP1200 EPLD leapt far beyond the abilities of any PAL, heading towards gate-array territory, but with a field-programmable device. Its gate capacity was significantly smaller than any gate array, but it demonstrated that Altera was headed in the right direction. The photo below shows an Altera EP1200 EPLD mounted in a 40-pin DIP.

Altera EP1200 EPLD 封装于 40 引脚 DIP 封装中。图片来源：Michael Holley

Altera EP1200 EPLD mounted in a 40-pin DIP. Image Credit: Michael Holley

（注：Altera 的 EP600、EP900 和 EP1200 EPLD 芯片的独特之处在于，它们出现在 Michael Slater 于 1987 年 9 月创办的《微处理器报告》创刊号上。这其实算不上什么荣誉，因为 Slater 在创办《微处理器报告》之前，曾在 Asilomar 微型计算机研讨会上磨练技艺，而他的专长正是收集和讨论芯片勘误。因此，Slater 在其创刊号的“缺陷与怪癖”栏目中发表的关于 EPLD 的简短文章写道：“Altera 的 EP600、900 和 1200 器件具有自动待机模式，当所有输入信号在大约 100 纳秒内没有变化时，该模式就会启动。此功能旨在处理缓慢变化的输入信号时节省功耗。然而，如果器件处于待机模式，当相关输入信号发生变化时，组合逻辑输出可能会出现故障。因此，除非您的系统是完全同步的，否则不建议使用此类器件。”可以容忍EPLD输出上的故障，设置“Turbo”位可以防止芯片进入待机模式。”（这确实是个有用的建议，但我总觉得Altera并不喜欢这种宣传，当然，我可能猜错了。）

(Note: Altera’s EP600, EP900, and EP1200 EPLDs are uniquely distinguished by appearing in the premiere issue of Michael Slater’s The Microprocessor Report, in September, 1987. It was a dubious honor because Slater’s specialty, honed at Asilomar Microcomputer Workshops before he founded The Microprocessor Report, was collecting and discussing chip errata. Consequently, Slater’s short EPLD article, which appears in the “Bugs and Quirks” section in the premiere issue of his newsletter, says: “Altera’s EP600, 900, and 1200 devices have an automatic standby mode which is initiated whenever all inputs have not changed for approximately 100 ns. This feature is designed to save power when operating with slowly changing inputs. Unfortunately, if the device is in standby mode, glitches may occur on combinatorial outputs when related inputs change. So, unless your system is fully synchronous and can tolerate glitches on the EPLD’s outputs, set the ‘Turbo’ bit to prevent the chip from ever going into standby mode.” Helpful advice, but something tells me Altera didn’t appreciate the publicity, although I might be wrong about that.)

最终，可编程逻辑器件供应商的营销人员不再将他们规模更大的可编程逻辑器件称为“PLD”，而是将其扩展为“CPLD”（复杂PLD）。CPLD继续模仿MMI PAL中原始的宏单元结构；它们只是拥有更多的输入输出，并集成了更多的宏单元。从逻辑上讲，CPLD就是将许多PAL宏单元放置在同一芯片上，并全部连接在一起。

Eventually, marketers working for programmable-logic vendors stopped calling their larger programmable-logic devices “PLDs” and inflated the term to “CPLDs” (complex PLDs). CPLDs continued to mimic the original macrocell organization in MMI’s PALs; they just had more inputs and outputs and incorporated more macrocells. Logically, CPLDs are a bunch of PAL macrocells, placed on the same chip, and all wired together.

如果你期待在本文中看到 Altera 转型成为 FPGA 供应商，那么很遗憾，直到 1992 年 Altera 推出首款 FPGA——Flex 8000 时，这种情况才会发生。Altera 很快便用 Flex 10K 系列取代了 Flex 8000 FPGA，Flex 10K 系列是首批集成嵌入式 RAM 模块的 FPGA。Altera 的 Flex 10K 系列取得了相当大的成功，但这与 CPLD 的故事无关。起初，Altera 对 Xilinx 的 FPGA 专利非常谨慎，甚至将 Flex 8000 和 Flex 10K 器件称为“基于 LUT 的 PLD”，而不是 FPGA。然而，三十年后，这似乎已不再是个问题。

If you were expecting Altera to become an FPGA vendor in this article, that won’t happen until Altera introduces its first FPGA, the Flex 8000, in 1992. Altera quickly replaced the Flex 8000 FPGA with the Flex 10K family, which were the first FPGAs to incorporate embedded RAM blocks. Altera’s Flex 10K family was quite successful, but that’s not part of the CPLD story. At first, Altera was so wary of Xilinx’s FPGA patents that it referred to the Flex 8000 and Flex 10K devices as “LUT based PLDs” instead of FPGAs. However, this no longer seems to be an issue, three decades later.

与 PAL、其他小型 PLD 和 CPLD 相比，FPGA 具有诸多优势和益处。我将在本系列文章的最后一章（下周）中探讨首款 FPGA 的发展历程。

FPGAs offer many advantages and benefits over PALs, other smaller PLDs, and CPLDs. I’ll discuss the history of the first FPGA in the final chapter of this article series, next week.

敬请关注。

Stay tuned.

 

 

参考

References

Altera EP300 设计与开发口述历史小组，计算机历史博物馆，2009 年 8 月 20 日。

Altera EP300 Design & Development Oral History Panel, Computer History Museum, August 20, 2009.

唐·法里亚口述历史，计算机历史博物馆，2017 年 10 月 16 日。

Oral History of Don Faria, Computer History Museum, October 16, 2017.

Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 22V10 可编程阵列逻辑 (PAL) 开发团队口述历史小组，计算机历史博物馆，2012 年 7 月 19 日。

Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) 22V10 Programmable Array Logic (PAL) Development Team Oral History Panel, Computer History Museum, July 19, 2012.

IC 初创企业 1987：下一代，Dataquest 半导体产业集团，1986 年。

I.C. Startups 1987: The Next Generation, Dataquest Semiconductor Industry Group, 1986.

FPGA的诞生历程（第五部分）：可编程二极管阵列、FPLA、PAL、EPLD和CPLD为FPGA铺平了道路

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 5 Programmable Diode Arrays, FPLAs, PALs, EPLDs, and CPLDs Paved the Way for FPGAs

正如本系列文章第 1 至 4 部分所述，最早的 PLD 沿着清晰可辨的谱系发展而来，其起源可以追溯到 20 世纪 60 年代哈里斯半导体公司的可编程二极管阵列，并经历了双极型 PROM、Signetics 公司的 82S100 FPLA、MMI 公司的 PAL，最终发展为 Altera 和 Lattice Semiconductor 公司开发的超越以往的 CMOS PAL 器件。相比之下，FPGA（在第一份新闻稿中被称为“逻辑单元阵列”）虽然源于类似的概念——现场可编程逻辑，但其发展方向却截然不同。

As discussed in Parts 1 through 4 of this article series, the earliest PLDs evolved along easily traced genetic lines that started with Harris Semiconductor’s programmable diode arrays from the 1960s and progressed through bipolar PROMs, the Signetics 82S100 FPLA, MMI’s PALs, and finally the transcendent CMOS replications of PAL devices created by Altera and Lattice Semiconductor. By contrast, FPGAs (called “Logic Cell Arrays” in the first press release) came from a similar concept, field-programmable logic, but from an entirely different direction.

20世纪80年代初，在微处理器先驱Zilog公司工作期间，一位名叫罗斯·弗里曼的工程师构思了一种可重编程的新型逻辑电路：一块硅片即可满足ASIC客户的逻辑设计需求，并且设计周期极短。当时，可能有数十家甚至数百家ASIC公司为成千上万的客户设计和制造定制芯片。然而，ASIC的设计和制造需要数月时间。弗里曼的想法使得定制集成电路的开发和实现能够在一天之内完成。

While working at microprocessor pioneer Zilog in the early 1980s, an engineer named Ross Freeman conceived of a new logic circuit that was reprogrammable: a single piece of silicon that could meet the logic-design needs of ASIC customers, but with instant turnaround on the design. At that time, there were dozens, perhaps hundreds, of ASIC companies designing and building custom silicon for thousands of customers. However, designing and fabricating ASICs took many months. Freeman’s idea would permit the development and implementation of a custom IC in less than a day.

弗里曼于1969年获得密歇根州立大学物理学学士学位，并于1971年获得伊利诺伊大学硕士学位。他曾在和平队工作，并在加纳教授数学两年，之后加入电传打字机公司，积累了PMOS设计经验。弗里曼是最早加入费德里科·法金创立的微处理器初创公司Zilog的工程师之一，并设计了Zilog Z80-SIO芯片。30岁出头时，弗里曼就已是Zilog组件部门的工程总监。

Freeman earned a BS degree in physics from Michigan State University in 1969 and a master’s from University of Illinois in 1971. He worked in the Peace Corps and taught math in Ghana for two years, and then joined Teletype Corporation where he got some PMOS design experience. Freeman was one of the first engineers to join Federico Faggin’s new microprocessor startup named Zilog, where he designed the Zilog Z80-SIO chip. Freeman was the Zilog Components Division’s Director of Engineering by the time he reached his early 30s.

弗里曼在Zilog公司工作期间，构思了一种新型的硬件可编程器件——它后来成为世界上第一款FPGA。他申请了多项专利，但Zilog公司对这一概念并不感兴趣。弗里曼决定创办自己的半导体公司来推进FPGA项目，并说服了Zilog的同事吉姆·巴内特加入。两人随后又说服了Zilog公司经验丰富的电子和半导体行业高管伯尼·冯德施密特担任这家初创公司的首席执行官。

Freeman conceived of a new type of hardware-programmable device – destined to become the world’s first FPGA – while working at Zilog. He filed several patents, but Zilog was not interested in pursuing the concept. Freeman decided to start his own semiconductor company to pursue the FPGA concept and convinced Jim Barnett, a Zilog coworker, to join him. The two of them persuaded Bernie Vonderschmitt, an experienced electronics and semiconductor executive working at Zilog, to become the startup’s CEO.

在加入Zilog之前，冯德施密特已在RCA公司工作了三十余年。1953年，他领导RCA的彩色电视研发工作，最终升任公司固态器件部门副总裁兼总经理。该部门开发了COSMOS（RCA对CMOS技术的商标名称）。精工的高管曾到访RCA固态器件部门，寻求获得RCA的COSMOS工艺技术授权，以助力其电子腕表业务的快速发展。冯德施密特将RCA的COSMOS工艺授权给了精工爱普生公司。到1973年，该公司开始销售基于精工爱普生公司CMOS芯片的精工数字液晶腕表。

Vonderschmitt had spent more than three decades at RCA Corp before he joined Zilog. He headed RCA’s color television development in 1953 and eventually became the Vice President and General Manager of the company’s Solid State Division, which had developed COSMOS (RCA’s trade name for CMOS). Seiko executives visited RCA’s Solid State Division seeking a license for RCA’s COSMOS process technology to help jumpstart its electronic wristwatch business. Vonderschmitt licensed RCA’s COSMOS process to Seiko Epson, and by 1973, the company started selling Seiko digital LCD wristwatches based on CMOS chips made by Seiko Epson.

在担任RCA固态器件部门负责人期间，冯德施密特清楚地认识到半导体制造业对资金的巨大需求，这种需求源于每隔几年就需要升级工艺技术以跟上摩尔定律的步伐。那些未能投资晶圆厂的公司很快就被淘汰出局。

While serving as the head of RCA’s Solid State Division, Vonderschmitt got a clear-eyed view of semiconductor manufacturing’s voracious appetite for capital, driven by the need to upgrade process technology every couple of years to keep pace with Moore’s Law. Companies that failed to invest in their fabs quickly dropped out of the game.

冯德施密特经常难以从母公司获得所需的资金，以扩大新型集成电路工艺技术的生产规模，这主要是因为芯片制造对RCA来说始终只是副业。公司更倾向于生产消费电子和广播设备。基于他在RCA固态器件部门的经验，冯德施密特认为自建半导体晶圆厂成本太高，负担太重。“如果我将来创办一家半导体公司，它一定会是无晶圆厂的，”他发誓道。

Vonderschmitt often had trouble obtaining needed capital from the parent corporation to scale new IC process technologies for production, largely because chip making was always just a side hustle for RCA. The company preferred making consumer and broadcast equipment. Based on his experience with RCA’s Solid State Division, Vonderschmitt decided that captive semiconductor fabs were just too expensive and too burdensome. “If I ever start a semiconductor company, it will be fabless,” he vowed.

1984年2月，冯德施密特、弗里曼和巴内特正式创立了赛灵思公司。冯德施密特计划将赛灵思的重点放在设计创新型可编程器件上，并与其他公司合作，以获得资本密集型的​​芯片制造业务。他利用与精工爱普生公司高管草间三郎长达十年的友谊，争取草间三郎的帮助，最终促成精工爱普生公司生产赛灵思的FPGA芯片。

Vonderschmitt, Freeman, and Barnett officially founded Xilinx in February 1984. Vonderschmitt planned to focus Xilinx on designing innovative programmable devices and partnering with other companies to gain access to capital-intensive chip manufacturing. He leveraged his decade-long friendship with a Seiko Epson executive named Saburo Kusama and enlisted his help in getting Seiko Epson to manufacture Xilinx FPGAs.

设计第一颗FPGA的任务落在了从Zilog公司挖来的工程师比尔·卡特（Bill Carter）身上。弗里曼最初聘请卡特参与Zilog Z8000微处理器项目。正如硅谷经常发生的那样，卡特很快就跟随弗里曼去了赛灵思（Xilinx），从事FPGA设计工作。他之前有过双极型和MOS集成电路的设计经验，但精工爱普生（Seiko Epson）采用的是CMOS工艺。赛灵思FPGA将是他的第一个CMOS芯片设计作品。

The task of actually designing the first FPGA fell to an engineer recruited from Zilog named Bill Carter. Freeman had originally hired Carter to work on the Zilog Z8000 microprocessor project. As frequently happens in Silicon Valley, Carter quickly followed Freeman to Xilinx to work on FPGA designs. He had previous bipolar and MOS IC design experience, but Seiko Epson’s process technology was CMOS. The Xilinx FPGA would be his first CMOS chip design.

与之后所有FPGA一样，第一款FPGA芯片体积非常大。冯德施密特经常建议卡特尽可能简化设计，不要尝试任何“过于巧妙或奇特”的方法。对冯德施密特来说，降低设计风险至关重要。他意识到，一家小型初创公司如果提供一款需要使用陌生设计工具、并且采用独特的无晶圆厂商业模式制造的首款芯片，很容易吓跑客户。

Like all FPGAs that followed, the first FPGA would be a very large chip. Vonderschmitt regularly advised Carter to keep the design as simple as possible and to not try anything “too clever or exotic.” Minimizing design risk was very important to Vonderschmitt. He realized that a tiny startup offering a first-of-its-kind chip that required unfamiliar design tools and was fabricated through a unique fabless business model could easily scare off customers.

精工爱普生 (Seiko Epson) 的 CMOS 数字手表芯片采用了非常保守的设计规则，以最大限度地提高良率并降低成本，因为手表行业的价格竞争非常激烈。数字手表芯片速度很慢，真的非常慢，运行频率只有 32kHz。而赛灵思 (Xilinx) 的首款 FPGA 设计既不保守，速度也不慢。赛灵思的目标是实现数十兆赫兹的时钟频率。

Seiko Epson’s CMOS digital watch chips employed very conservative design rules to maximize yields and drive down costs, because the watch business is very price competitive. Digital watch chips are slow. Really, really slow. They run at 32KHz. The first Xilinx FPGA design would not be conservative and it would not be slow. Xilinx was shooting for clock rates in the tens of MHz.
