第一代FPGA的架构主要基于一个模块化的CLB（可配置逻辑块）和一个模块化的I/O块，并重复使用多次。重复使用相同的模块化块极大地简化了FPGA的设计，这对于当时设计团队规模小、工具匮乏的初创公司来说至关重要。这种情况与英特尔1968年的创业历程惊人地相似。罗伯特·诺伊斯和戈登·摩尔创立英特尔的初衷是将其打造成为一家存储器公司，因为存储器芯片的设计会反复使用相同的存储单元，从而以最低的设计成本制造出相对复杂的芯片。

The first FPGA’s architecture was largely based on one modular CLB (configurable logic block) and one modular I/O block, repeated many, many times. Repetitive use of identical modular blocks greatly simplified the FPGA’s design, which was essential, considering the small design team and minimal design tools available to the startup. The situation is strikingly similar to Intel’s beginnings in 1968. Robert Noyce and Gordon Moore founded Intel to be a memory company, because memory chip designs repetitively use the same memory cell over and over again, which yields a relatively complex chip with minimal design costs.

卡特的FPGA设计最终需要大约85,000个晶体管来实现其64个可配置逻辑块和58个I/O块。相比之下，16/32位的摩托罗拉68000微处理器所需的晶体管数量更少。FPGA的芯片尺寸将比当时几乎所有芯片都大，而且肯定比精工爱普生以往生产的任何芯片都要大得多。

Carter’s finished FPGA design required approximately 85,000 transistors to implement its 64 configurable logic blocks and 58 I/O blocks. The 16/32-bit Motorola 68000 microprocessor needed fewer transistors. The FPGA’s die size would be larger than almost any chip being manufactured at that time, and it would certainly be a much bigger chip than anything Seiko Epson had ever fabricated.

赛灵思的第一款芯片于1985年5月下旬完成流片，但设计团队不得不等待两个月，直到7月初才拿到首批硅片。精工爱普生寄来一盒25片成品晶圆。盒子里的前十片晶圆完全失效，全部都是电源到地线的短路。这可不是个好兆头。第十一片晶圆略有起效，但电流消耗非常高。最后十四片晶圆也完全失效，同样存在电源到地线的短路。

The first Xilinx chip taped out in late May 1985, and the design team had to wait two more months, until early July, for first-run silicon. Seiko Epson sent a box containing 25 finished wafers. The first ten wafers out of the box were completely dead. All had solid power-to-ground shorts. Not a good start. The eleventh wafer showed some signs of life but exhibited very high current draw. The last fourteen wafers were also completely dead. They, too, had short circuits between power and ground.

卡特的团队发现，所有首批晶圆上都覆盖着铝须。蚀刻不良的铝金属化层导致电源轨和地线短路。幸运的是，那块仅部分失效的晶圆上的金属须非常脆弱，可以像保险丝一样熔断。（第一代FPGA并非设计为保险丝可编程器件，但由于制造工艺缺陷而变成了这样。）测试团队通过向晶圆注入大量电流，成功地汽化了这些金属须。这是一次冒险的尝试，但损失不大。

Carter’s team discovered that there were aluminum whiskers covering all of the first-run wafers. A poorly etched aluminum metallization layer shorted out the power and ground rails. Fortunately, the metal whiskers on the wafer that was only partially dead were tenuous enough to blow like fuses. (The first FPGA was not designed as a fuse-programmable device, but a flawed manufacturing process made it one.) The test team managed to vaporize the whiskers by driving a massive amount of current into the wafer. It was a risky gamble, but there was little to lose.

短路故障排除后，卡特终于能够将一个简单的配置比特流时钟信号输入到器件中。他成功地将一个反相器编程到其中一个CLB芯片中。卡特立即打电话给正在日本出差的弗里曼和冯德施密特，报告说“DONE线已变为高电平”，这意味着赛灵思“成功制造出了世界上最昂贵的反相器”。在这次初步成功之后，设计团队得以将更多不同的逻辑电路编程到FPGA中。

With the shorts cleared, Carter was finally able to clock a simple configuration bit stream into a device. He successfully programmed an inverter into one of the CLBs. Carter immediately called Freeman and Vonderschmitt while they were traveling in Japan, reporting that the “DONE line had gone high,” which signified that Xilinx “had successfully created the world’s most expensive inverter.” After this initial success, the design team was able to program more and different logic circuits into the FPGA.

1985年11月1日的新闻稿宣布推出Xilinx XC2064，这是世界上首款“逻辑单元阵列”。这是FPGA最初的分类，但该器件最终被命名为FPGA。下图是Xilinx XC2064的照片，采用40引脚DIP封装：

A press release dated November 1, 1985 announced the Xilinx XC2064, the world’s first “Logic Cell Array.” That was the FPGA’s original classification, but the device was destined to be called an FPGA. Here’s a photo of the Xilinx XC2064, packaged in a 40-pin DIP:

从策略上看，Xilinx 的新闻稿并没有将 XC2064 定位为 PLD，而是称其为一种新型 ASIC。这种措辞体现了 Xilinx 专注于高端逻辑可编程性的战略。“逻辑单元阵列具备其他 ASIC 的所有优势——芯片数量更少、性能更高、系统尺寸更小、功耗更低、可靠性更高——却无需承担任何时间、成本和风险方面的代价，”新闻稿宣称。新闻稿第二页指出：“逻辑单元阵列采用类似门阵列的架构。”

Strategically, the press release didn’t position the Xilinx XC2064 as a PLD. It called the device a new type of ASIC. This wording reflects Xilinx’s orientation towards the higher end of logic programmability. “Logic cell arrays provide all the benefits associated with other ASICs – reduced chip count, high performance, smaller system size, lower power consumption and high reliability – with none of the time, cost and risk penalties,” proclaimed the press release. The second page of the release stated “Logic cell arrays use a gate array-like architecture.”

随后，新闻稿进一步拉大了Xilinx新型FPGA与现有PAL和PLD之间的差距：

The press release then puts even more distance between the new Xilinx FPGA and existing PALs and PLDs:

因此，该器件可与小型门阵列相媲美，并且比可编程阵列逻辑（或“PAL型”）器件具有更高的复杂度，后者通常提供150到300个等效门。XC20​​64可以替代小型门阵列；15到75个SSI和MSI（中小规模集成）器件；或四个或更多目前可用的PAL型器件。

“The device is therefore comparable to smaller gate arrays and provides higher complexity than do programmable array logic type (or ‘PAL-type’) devices, which typically offer from 150 to 300 equivalent gates. The XC2064 can take the place of smaller gate arrays; 15 to 75 SSI and MSI (small- and medium-scale integration) devices; or four or more currently available PAL-type devices.”

尽管FPGA具有这些优势，但其普及速度却很缓慢，不像MMI的PAL芯片在20世纪70年代末那样迅速普及。这是因为John Birkner和MMI确保了PAL芯片能够非常方便地被系统设计人员集成到他们现有的设计方法中：PAL芯片速度快；简单易懂；与现有的基于TTL的设计技术完美契合；而且单个PAL芯片的成本虽然比TTL芯片略高，但差距并不大。

Despite these advantages, FPGA adoption came slowly, unlike the rapid adoption that MMI’s PALs experienced in the late 1970s. That’s because John Birkner and MMI made sure that PALs were very easy for system designers to incorporate into their existing design methods: PALs were fast; they were simple and easy to understand; they fit well with existing TTL-based design techniques; and an individual PAL cost a little more than a TTL chip, but it didn’t cost a lot more.

Xilinx FPGA 完全是另一种截然不同的器件。与 ASIC 类似，FPGA 比 PAL 复杂得多，因此也更难理解和使用。FPGA 设计工具对大多数设计工程师来说完全陌生，就像 ASIC 设计工具一样。起初，没有人知道如何使用 FPGA。早期的 FPGA 与 TTL 和 PAL 器件相比速度很慢。XC20​​64 FPGA 只有 64 个 CLB，无法替代太多的逻辑电路，当然也比不上掩模门阵列。由于 Seiko Epson 难以制造出巨大的 CMOS 芯片，Xilinx 不得不对其 FPGA 收取高价才能获得利润。

The Xilinx FPGA was an entirely different beast. Like an ASIC, the FPGA was considerably more complicated than a PAL and therefore harder to understand and more difficult to use. FPGA design tools were completely unfamiliar to most design engineers, just like ASIC design tools. No one knew how to work with FPGAs, at first. Early FPGAs were slow compared to TTL and PAL devices. The XC2064 FPGA couldn’t replace all that much logic with only 64 CLBs. Certainly not as much as a masked gate array. The huge CMOS die that Seiko Epson had struggled to manufacture meant that Xilinx needed to charge a premium price for its FPGAs to get any sort of profit margin.

然而，尽管面临重重阻碍，FPGA 依然取得了成功。在接下来的二十年里，越来越多的 FPGA 厂商涌入市场，致力于集成电路板上几乎所有常见的数字功能，包括 SRAM、电平转换器、DSP 引擎、以太网和其他高速串行收发器，最终甚至包括完整的微处理器。随着时间的推移，FPGA 产品线逐渐分化为高端、中端和低成本产品线。随着 FPGA 选择的日益多样化，以及这些器件从大多数电路板上常用的其他芯片中吸收越来越多的数字功能，工程师们也越来越接受 FPGA。经过近四十年的发展，FPGA 如今已得到广泛应用。

And yet, despite all of these obstacles, FPGAs have succeeded. Over the next twenty years, more FPGA vendors entered the market, targeting and assimilating nearly every other digital function typically found on a circuit board, including SRAMs, level translators, DSP engines, Ethernet and other high-speed serial transceivers, and finally, entire microprocessors. Over time, FPGA offerings stratified into high-end, mid-range, and low-cost product lines. As FPGA choices diversified and as the devices vacuumed up more and more digital functions from other chips typically used on most circuit boards, engineers increasingly embraced FPGAs. After nearly four decades on the market, FPGAs are now widely used.

IEEE 于 2009 年将 Xilinx XC2064 列为“震撼世界的 25 款微芯片”之一，并于 2017 年将其纳入芯片名人堂。

The IEEE listed the Xilinx XC2064 as one of the “25 Microchips that Shook the World” in 2009 and inducted it into the Chip Hall of Fame in 2017.

注：FPGA自1985年问世以来的发展和多样化本身就是一个庞大而复杂的故事，需要单独撰写一系列文章来详述。

Note: The evolution and diversification of the FPGA after its 1985 debut is a large and complex story unto itself. That story requires its own article series.

敬请关注。

Stay tuned.

FPGA的诞生历程（第六部分）：Actel的FPGA故事

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 6: Actel’s FPGA Story

2021 年末，我发表了一篇题为“FPGA 的诞生”（下文有参考文献）的五篇系列文章。该系列文章记录了可编程逻辑的发展历程，从哈里斯半导体公司最早的可编程二极管阵列开始，一直到双极型 PROM、Signetics 82S100 FPLA、MMI 的初代双极型 PAL、Altera 和 Lattice Semiconductor 的 CMOS PAL 器件，最终到 Xilinx 于 1985 年推出的首款 FPGA。然而，该系列文章遗漏了 FPGA 领域一位重要的参与者：成立于 1985 年的 Actel 公司。最近，我有幸采访了 Actel 的创始人之一 Esmat Hamdy 博士，为计算机历史博物馆的口述历史项目做报道，他为我们补全了这段缺失的环节。以下是 Actel 的 FPGA 故事。

Late in 2021, I published a five-part series titled “How the FPGA Came To Be” (referenced below). That series chronicled the development of programmable logic from the earliest days of Harris Semiconductor’s programmable diode arrays and continued through the development of bipolar PROMs, the Signetics 82S100 FPLA, MMI’s original bipolar PALs, CMOS PAL devices from Altera and Lattice Semiconductor, and finally the introduction of the first FPGA by Xilinx in 1985. However, that series omitted one important player in the FPGA game that was founded in 1985: Actel. I recently had the opportunity to interview one of Actel’s founders, Dr Esmat Hamdy, for a Computer History Museum Oral History, who provided the missing link. Here is Actel’s FPGA story.

作为一名埃及外交官的儿子，埃斯马特·哈姆迪从小就习惯了每两年就从一个国家搬到另一个国家。他记得父亲最后任职的两个国家是玻利维亚和阿根廷。他也记得，由于频繁的调动，父亲在那段时间里没能结交到任何长久的朋友。因此，哈姆迪并不喜欢外交官的生活。他的祖父曾是开罗铁路的工程师，他对哈姆迪说：“埃斯马特，我希望你能发明点什么。” 听从祖父的建议，哈姆迪决定成为一名工程师，并在16岁时进入开罗大学学习工程学。

As the son of an Egyptian diplomat, Esmat Hamdy grew accustomed to moving from one country to the next every two years. He remembers that the last two countries his father served in were Bolivia and Argentina. He also remembers that he was not able to make any long-term friends during this period in his life due to the frequent relocations. Consequently, Hamdy did not relish the life of a diplomat. His grandfather had been an engineer for the railroad in Cairo and told Hamdy, “Esmat, I want you to invent something.” Taking his grandfather’s advice, Hamdy decided to become an engineer and went to Cairo University at the age of 16 to study engineering.

开罗大学的工程学专业是五年制，所以哈姆迪21岁就毕业了。第一年是工程学概论课。第一年结束后，学生需要选择一个工程方向，哈姆迪选择了电子工程，专攻电子学，而不是另一个选择：发电和输电。当时，电子学课程涵盖真空管，所以哈姆迪学习了真空管二极管和三极管。直到最后一年，哈姆迪才选修了半导体课程。

The engineering program at Cairo University was a 5-year program, so Hamdy graduated at the age of 21. The first year of the program was a general introduction to engineering. After the first year, students were asked to choose a branch of engineering, and Hamdy chose electrical engineering, specializing in electronics rather than the alternative: power generation and transmission. At that time, electronics classes covered vacuum tubes, so Hamdy learned about tube diodes and triodes. Only in his final year did Hamdy take a class in semiconductors.

毕业后，哈姆迪在附近的赫勒万大学担任助教，同时在开罗大学攻读硕士学位。他选择薄膜沉积作为硕士论文的研究课题，并开发了一种计量技术，用于实时监测铝薄膜沉积过程中的厚度。获得硕士学位后，哈姆迪开始寻找攻读博士学位的大学。他选择了加拿大滑铁卢大学，因为他的一些开罗朋友后来去了滑铁卢大学。他在滑铁卢大学的博士生导师建议哈姆迪再攻读一个硕士学位作为备选方案，以防万一他因某种原因无法完成博士学位。这样，他就拥有一个北美硕士学位，与他在开罗大学获得的硕士学位相辅相成。哈姆迪于1975年开始攻读滑铁卢大学的硕士学位，并于1977年开始攻读博士学位。到1980年，他已获得这两个学位。

After graduating, Hamdy took a position as an assistant teacher at nearby Helwan University and started working on his master’s degree at Cairo University. He chose thin-film deposition for the subject of his master’s thesis and developed metrology to monitor the thickness of thin-film aluminum in real time as it was being deposited. Once he’d earned his master’s degree, Hamdy started looking for a university for his PhD degree. He chose the University of Waterloo in Canada because some of his friends from Cairo went on to Waterloo. His PhD advisor at Waterloo suggested that Hamdy earn a second master’s degree as a backup plan in case he was not able to finish his PhD for some reason. That way, he’d have a North American master’s degree to back up his master’s degree from Cairo University. Hamdy started working on his Waterloo master’s degree in 1975 and his PhD in 1977. He’d earned both degrees by 1980.

那时，哈姆迪该找工作，正式步入职场了。他向六家公司递交了简历，包括施乐、飞利浦、仙童半导体、德州仪器、英特尔和惠普（HP）。所有公司都给了他offer。哈姆迪最终认为英特尔和惠普是最佳选择。英特尔是一家雄心勃勃的半导体初创公司，在短短一年内就推出了首款商用DRAM、EEPROM和微处理器，堪称奇迹。惠普则是一家传奇的系统和技术公司，由比尔·休利特和戴夫·帕卡德于1939年创立。两家公司提供的起薪相同，因此哈姆迪选择了英特尔，因为英特尔的offer包含股票，而惠普的则不包含。

By then it was time for Hamdy to find an employer and enter the workforce. He applied to six companies, including Xerox, Philips, Fairchild Semiconductor, Texas Instruments, Intel, and Hewlett-Packard (HP). He received offers from all of them. Hamdy decided that the best candidates were Intel and HP. Intel was the brash semiconductor startup that had introduced the first commercial DRAM, EEPROM, and microprocessor all in one miraculous year. HP was the legendary systems and technology company started by Bill Hewlett and Dave Packard in 1939. Both companies offered the same starting salary, so Hamdy chose Intel because the company’s offer included stock. HP’s offer did not.

哈姆迪加入了英特尔位于俄勒冈州的DRAM团队。他最初负责公司64kbit NMOS DRAM的半导体工艺技术，随后开始研发256kbit CMOS DRAM，大约在1985年英特尔决定退出DRAM业务的同时。DRAM业务剥离后，哈姆迪继续留在英特尔。他的下一个重要任务是提高CMOS 80386微处理器的良率。80386是在英特尔位于加利福尼亚州圣克拉拉的工厂设计的，但由于圣克拉拉的制造工艺限制，其良率并不理想。哈姆迪在俄勒冈州的团队在不改变设计的情况下，改进了工艺技术和器件物理特性，最终将80386的良率提升到了可接受的水平。

Hamdy joined Intel’s DRAM group in Oregon. He initially worked on semiconductor process technology for the company’s 64kbit NMOS DRAM and then started working on a 256kbit CMOS DRAM, about the time that Intel decided to exit the DRAM business in 1985. Hamdy stayed with Intel after the company’s DRAM divestiture. His next major assignment was to get the CMOS 80386 microprocessor to yield. The 80386 had been designed at Intel’s facilities in Santa Clara, California, but it was not yielding well using Santa Clara’s manufacturing process. Hamdy’s team in Oregon modified the process technology and device physics without changing the design and were able to boost yields of the 80386 to acceptable levels.

当时，Hamdy在英特尔的直属上司是Amr Mohson，他正计划创办自己的半导体公司。Mohson招募了Hamdy和Abbas El Gamel，后者是斯坦福大学的教授，曾在LSI Logic工作，该公司是掩模编程门阵列（PMGA）的早期开拓者。掩模编程门阵列的两大难题是：非重复性工程（NRE）成本高昂，以及器件交付前的漫长周转时间。与此同时，包括MMI的PAL和Lattice、Altera的复杂PLD（CPLD）在内的可编程逻辑器件（PLC）发展势头不佳。设计人员需要PLD的现场可编程性，但又需要在封装内集成更多逻辑门。当时半导体领域尚无此类市场，因此这三位创业者决定成立一家专注于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）开发的公司。这家公司后来发展成为Actel。

At the time, Hamdy’s supervisor at Intel was Amr Mohson, who wanted to start his own semiconductor company. Mohson enlisted Hamdy and Abbas El Gamel, a Stanford University professor who’d worked at LSI Logic, which was an early pioneer for mask-programmed gate arrays. The two big problems with mask-programmed gate arrays were the non-recurring engineering (NRE) costs and long turnaround times before parts became available. Meanwhile, programmable logic devices, including MMI’s PALs and complex PLDs (CPLDs) from Lattice and Altera, were running out of steam. Designers wanted the field programmability of PLDs, but they needed more logic gates in the package. This semiconductor niche was empty at the time, so the three entrepreneurs decided to found a company that focused on the development of field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). That company would become Actel.

从一开始，Actel 的创始人就计划为 FPGA 的可编程互连开发一种反熔丝技术。反熔丝在编程前具有很高的电阻。编程后，反熔丝的电阻会大幅降低。最初的计划是开发一种金属-金属反熔丝，用于连接 IC 上两个金属层之间的走线。然而，这种反熔丝需要非常平整的金属层，而这在化学机械抛光 (CMP) 技术出现之前是无法实现的。

From the beginning, Actel’s founders planned to develop an antifuse technology for the FPGA’s programmable interconnect. An antifuse has a high resistance until you program it. After programming, the antifuse exhibits a much lower resistance. The original plan was to develop a metal-metal antifuse that would connect traces between two metal layers on the IC. However, such an antifuse requires very flat metal layers, which could not be manufactured until the advent of chemical-mechanical polishing (CMP).

作为过渡方案，Actel 设计团队将反熔丝置于集成电路的多晶硅层和扩散层之间。Actel 将这种反熔丝称为“可编程低阻抗电路元件”（PLICE）。一层 10 纳米厚的氧化物-氮化物-氧化物薄膜将多晶硅层与扩散层隔开。编程脉冲会使该薄膜层切换到导电性更强的状态。

As an interim step, the Actel design team placed the antifuse between the IC’s polysilicon and diffusion layers. Actel called this antifuse a “programmable low-impedance circuit element,” or PLICE. A 10nm thin film of oxide-nitride-oxide separated the polysilicon layer from the diffusion layer. A programming pulse would cause the thin-film layer to switch to a more conductive state.

Actel 的 PLICE 反熔丝的初步测试结果惨不忍睹。一个编程后的反熔丝的导通电阻竟然高达 10 千欧姆到 20 千欧姆，这远远超出了正常范围。Actel 团队立即进入灾难恢复模式，Hamdy 回忆说，为了解决这个问题，他们连续三个月每天开两次会。他说，在那段时间里，他瘦了 20 磅（约 9 公斤）。

Initial results with Actel’s PLICE antifuse were disastrous. A programmed antifuse exhibited an “on” resistance of 10Kohms to 20Kohms, which was far too high. The Actel team went into disaster recovery mode, and Hamdy recalls meeting twice a day for three months straight trying to develop a solution to this problem. During that time, he says he lost 20 pounds.

最终的解决方案是在多晶硅层中大量掺杂砷。在编程过程中，施加的电场和产生的热量会将砷注入薄膜绝缘层，形成一个可靠的反熔丝，其导通电阻为 500 欧姆，这对于集成电路上的短走线来说是可以接受的。虽然该电阻对于驱动长走线来说仍然过高，但使用更高电流的编程脉冲可以将导通电阻降低到 200 欧姆。当化学机械抛光 (CMP) 工艺出现后，Actel 公司改用金属-金属反熔丝，不再需要大量掺杂砷。

In the end, the solution was to heavily dope the polysilicon layer with arsenic. During programming, the applied electric field and generated heat would drive the arsenic into the thin-film insulation layer, creating a reliable antifuse with an “on” resistance of 500 ohms, which was acceptable for shorter tracks on the IC. The resistance was still too high to drive long tracks, but a programming pulse using higher currents could reduce the “on” resistance to as low as 200 ohms. When CMP became available as a process step, Actel switched to a metal-metal antifuse, and the heavy arsenic doping was no longer required.

Actel于1988年推出了首批FPGA产品。Xilinx自1985年起就开始销售基于SRAM可编程性的“逻辑单元阵列”（Logic Cell Arrays）。这些产品是市场上最早的FPGA。Altera自1983年起就开始销售基于EPROM的CPLD，但随着CPLD体积变得过于庞大，最终在1988年后被迫转型进入FPGA市场。据Actel前首席执行官John East称，Actel是第一家使用“FPGA”这一术语的公司。

Actel shipped its first FPGAs in 1988. Xilinx had been shipping parts that the company called “Logic Cell Arrays,” based on SRAM programmability, since 1985. These parts were the first FPGAs on the market. Altera had been shipping EPROM-based CPLDs since 1983 and was eventually forced to move into the FPGA market after 1988, when CPLDs became impracticably large. According to Actel’s former CEO, John East, Actel was the first company to use the term FPGA.

由于Actel FPGA中使用的反熔丝能够抵御单粒子翻转（SEU），这项技术很快被军工和航空航天业采用。Hamdy在他的口述历史中说道：“无论是在日本、欧洲还是美国制造的卫星，没有一颗不使用我们产品的。火星探测车也使用了我们的产品。” Actel最初的半导体代工厂是德州仪器和三菱电机。然而，Actel也与拥有抗辐射加固工艺技术的军工承包商Loral建立了合作关系，因此Loral也成为了Actel的代工厂，并根据Actel的设计制造出了真正抗辐射的FPGA。

Because the antifuses used in Actel’s FPGAs were immune from single-event upsets (SEUs), the technology was readily adopted by the military and aerospace industry. In his oral history, Hamdy said, “There is no satellite either made in Japan, or in Europe, or in the US, which does not have our parts. The Mars Rover has our parts in it.” Actel’s initial semiconductor foundries were Texas Instruments and Mitsubishi Electric. However, Actel also developed a relationship with Loral, a military contractor with its own radiation-hardened process technology, so Loral also became a foundry for Actel and created truly rad-hard FPGAs based on Actel’s designs.

Actel 的反熔丝既是福音也是诅咒。福音在于其抗单粒子翻转（SEU）能力，这对于某些承担关键任务的产品来说至关重要。诅咒在于其不具备可扩展性。John East 在其题为《从 AMD 到 Actel（再到 Microchip）》的文章中写道：“……反熔丝需要复杂的定制制造工艺，这使得我们始终无法采用先进的工艺节点（Xilinx 始终采用最先进的工艺节点）。”

Actel’s antifuse was both a blessing and a curse. The blessing was the antifuse’s SEU immunity, which was highly desirable for certain products with critical missions. The curse was that the antifuse was not scalable. In his article titled “From AMD to Actel (to Microchip),” John East wrote, “… antifuses required a difficult custom fab process that prohibited us from ever being on an advanced process node (Xilinx was always on the most advanced process nodes.)”

伊斯特最终决定从Actel退休。2010年，专注于军工/航空航天市场元件销售的半导体公司Microsemi收购了Actel。八年后，Microchip收购了Microsemi，并将Actel的产品纳入了公司的产品组合。哈姆迪现在是Microchip的高级研究员，他仍然活跃在FPGA领域。

East eventually decided to retire from Actel. Microsemi, a semiconductor company that specialized in component sales to the Mil/Aero market, bought Actel in 2010. Eight years later, Microchip purchased Microsemi and added Actel’s products to the company’s product portfolio. Hamdy is now a Senior Fellow at Microchip. He’s still in the FPGA game.

本系列前几篇文章：

Previous articles in this series:

FPGA的诞生历程（第一部分）

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 1

FPGA的诞生历程（第二部分）

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 2

FPGA的诞生历程（第三部分）

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 3

FPGA的诞生历程（第四部分）

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 4

FPGA的诞生历程（第五部分）

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 5

参考

Reference

John East，“从AMD到Actel（再到Microchip） ”，SemiWiki，2019年9月2日

John East, “From AMD to Actel (to Microchip),” SemiWiki, September 2, 2019

FPGA 的诞生（第 7 部分）：通用电气公司在 1971 年发明了 PLD 和 EPLD 吗？

How the FPGA Came To Be, Part 7: Did General Electric invent the PLD and EPLD in 1971?

我长期连载的系列文章“FPGA的诞生”（下文将提及）记录了可编程逻辑的发展历程，从20世纪60年代中期哈里斯半导体公司开发和销售的可编程二极管矩阵开始。这些二极管矩阵以及美国国家半导体公司的掩模可编程逻辑阵列（MPLA）启发了昙花一现的Intersil IM5200现场可编程逻辑阵列（FPLA）和更为成功的Signetics 82S100 FPLA，这两款产品均于1975年推出。约翰·伯克纳简化了FPLA的概念，促使MMI公司于1978年推出了首款可编程逻辑阵列（PAL）。这些器件都是基于双极半导体工艺的熔丝型器件，尽管Intersil器件的“熔丝”实际上是一个双极晶体管，由于编程过程中铝迁移而短路，因此它实际上是一种反熔丝。 Altera 于 1984 年开发并推出了第一款可擦除 PLD，即 EP300。

My long running series titled “How the FPGA Came To Be” (referenced below) chronicles the development of programmable logic starting with programmable diode matrices developed and marketed by Harris Semiconductor starting in the mid-1960s. These diode matrices along with a Mask Programmable Logic Array (MPLA) from National Semiconductor were the inspirations for the short-lived Intersil IM5200 Field Programmable Logic Array (FPLA) and the more successful Signetics 82S100 FPLA, both introduced in 1975. John Birkner streamlined the FPLA concept, leading to MMI’s introduction of the first PAL in 1978. These were all fuse-based devices based on bipolar semiconductor processes, although the “fuse” for the Intersil device was actually a bipolar transistor that shorted out due to aluminum migration during programming and was therefore really an antifuse. Altera developed and introduced the first erasable PLD, the EP300, in 1984.

Altera制作了一段93秒的短片，庆祝其近期从英特尔（Intel）手中半独立出来。英特尔曾在2015年收购了该公司。这段视频回顾了公司的发展历程，并理所当然地宣称，Altera开发了首款可擦除PLD。我看过这段视频，对其中夸张的营销宣传感到有些困惑，但话说回来，这毕竟是那些对LUT（查找表）不太了解的人才会做的营销。

Altera made a short, 93-second video to celebrate its recent semi-independence from Intel, which previously bought the company in 2015. The video chronicles the company’s history and claims, rightfully, that Altera developed the first erasable PLD. I’d seen this video and was a bit nonplussed by its breathless marketing claims, but hey, that’s marketing from the minds of people who are not LUT heads.

最近，Altera开始在LinkedIn上用这张图片宣传这段视频：

More recently, Altera started advertising the video on LinkedIn with this image:

Altera制作了一段93秒的视频，讲述了公司的发展历程，并使用这张图片进行宣传。没错，左边那位就是伦纳德·尼莫伊。他曾在20世纪80年代为Altera做过名人代言。图片来源：Altera

Altera made a 93-second video about its history and is using this image to advertise it. Yes, that’s Leonard Nimoy on the left. He provided celebrity advertising for Altera in the 1980s. Image credit: Altera

Altera 在 LinkedIn 上发布了一则推广该视频的帖子，随后引发了我与 Adaptive Design Ltd. 的首席技术官 Aurelian Lazarut 在 LinkedIn 上的一段离奇对话。Lazarut 声称 Altera 并非可擦除 PLD 的发明者，而是通用电气 (GE) 在 1971 年发明的。这真是令人震惊！以下是随后在 LinkedIn 上的对话原文，从 Altera 最初的 LinkedIn 帖子开始：

Altera’s LinkedIn posting that advertises this video then led to a bizarre interchange on LinkedIn between myself and Aurelian Lazarut, CTO at Adaptive Design ltd. Lazarut asserted that Altera did not invent the erasable PLD. General Electric (GE) did, in 1971. That was a shocker! Here’s the verbatim LinkedIn conversation that followed, starting with Altera’s initial LinkedIn post:

Altera 在 LinkedIn 上

Altera on LinkedIn

“自 80 年代初以来，FPGA 已经取得了长足的进步。”

“FPGAs have come a long way since the early 80s

“第一款FPGA只有64个逻辑单元。[编者注：那是赛灵思XC2064]

“The first FPGA had only 64 logic cells. [Editor’s note: That was the Xilinx XC2064]

“现代 FPGA 可以包含数百万个逻辑单元，从而实现复杂的 AI 和机器学习应用。

“Modern FPGAs can contain millions of logic cells, enabling complex AI and machine learning applications.

“FPGA的应用范围非常广泛，从太空探索到医学成像都得到了应用。”

“FPGAs are used in everything from space exploration to medical imaging

“观看此视频，了解更多关于我们在FPGA领域领导地位的历史。”

“Find out more about our history in FPGA leadership in this video

“创新者们，你们最喜欢FPGA技术的哪个应用？”

“Innovators, what’s your favorite application of FPGA technology?”

Aurelian Lazarut，Adaptive Design ltd. 的首席技术官

Aurelian Lazarut, CTO at Adaptive Design ltd.

据大家所知，第一个FPGA是由Xilinx公司的Ross Freeman（已故）发明的。美国专利US4870302A（https://patents.google.com/patent/US6191610B1/en）

“The first FPGA was invented by Ross Freeman (R.I.P) from Xilinx as far as everybody knows. US patent US4870302A (https://patents.google.com/patent/US6191610B1/en)

“请问有人有这项专利之前的专利链接吗？请分享一下。”

“Does anyone have a link to patent before this one? please share.

“或许Altera的市场部没收到通知……”

“Maybe Altera marketing department didn’t get the memo…”

史蒂夫·莱布森，Tirias Research 首席分析师（荣誉退休）/编辑/B2B 技术营销人员/故事讲述者/内容大师/布道者/工程师/IEEE 高级会员/诗人

Steve Leibson, Principal Analyst Emeritus, Tirias Research/Editor/B2B Technology Marketer/Storyteller/Content Ninja/Evangelist/Engineer/IEEE Senior Member/Poet

奥雷利安·拉扎鲁特：如果你仔细听这段很短的视频，你会发现 Altera 声称他们只制造了第一款可擦除 PLD，而不是 FPGA。事实上，直到 20 世纪 90 年代初，Altera 才开始使用“FPGA”这个术语。在此期间，Altera 基于对 PAL 架构的复制，制造了复杂的 PLD。最终，Altera 不得不接受 CPLD 的可扩展性限制，并开始制造 FPGA。AMD/Xilinx 和 Altera 在 FPGA 领域的双寡头垄断局面已经持续了 35 年。

“Aurelian Lazarut: If you listen to the very short video, Altera only claims to have made the first erasable PLD, not an FPGA. In fact, Altera purposely refused to use the term FPGA until the early 1990s. During the interim, Altera made complex PLDs based on replicating the PAL architecture. Eventually, Altera was forced to accept the scaling realities of CPLDs and started making FPGAs. The AMD/Xilinx and Altera FPGA duopoly has continued now for 35 years.

“我同意你的看法。上面的图片并不能准确地反映链接视频的内容，不过很高兴能再次想起伦纳德·尼莫伊曾经为 Altera 公司代言，称其为‘唯一合乎逻辑的选择’。”

“I agree with you. The above graphic does not accurately represent the linked video, but it’s great to be reminded that Leonard Nimoy once shilled for Altera, ‘The Only Logical Choice.’”

Aurelian Lazarut，Adaptive Design ltd. 的首席技术官

Aurelian Lazarut, CTO at Adaptive Design ltd.

“那是在文字描述里（不是视频里），他们删掉了。你来晚了。我只是想澄清一下。顺便说一句，EPLD也不是他们发明的（听听视频里的声音），是GE（https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Programmable_Array_Logic）发明的。在这个地平说的世界里，谁还在乎事实呢……”

“It was in the text description (not in the video) they took it out. You came late to the party. Just trying to set the record straight. Btw they didn’t invent the EPLD either (listen to the voice in the video) it was GE (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Programmable_Array_Logic) who cares about facts anyway on this flat earth…”

史蒂夫·莱布森，Tirias Research 首席分析师（荣誉退休）/编辑/B2B 技术营销人员/故事讲述者/内容大师/布道者/工程师/IEEE 高级会员/诗人

Steve Leibson, Principal Analyst Emeritus, Tirias Research/Editor/B2B Technology Marketer/Storyteller/Content Ninja/Evangelist/Engineer/IEEE Senior Member/Poet

“Aurelian Lazarut：正如视频中所述，Altera确实发明了可擦除PLD。早期的PAL芯片只能烧录一次。上世纪80年代初，我的桌子上就放着一纸杯一次性可编程PAL芯片。请参阅我在EEJournal上发表的关于FPGA发展史的六篇系列文章。最新一篇文章今天刚刚发布。”

“Aurelian Lazarut: Altera did invent the erasable PLD, as claimed in the video. Earlier PALs were burn once. I had a paper cup full of one-time programmable PALs on my desk in the early 1980s. Please see my 6-part series on FPGA history in EEJournal. Latest article just hit today.”

Aurelian LazarutView，Adaptive Design ltd. 的首席技术官

Aurelian LazarutView, CTO at Adaptive Design ltd.

“我们不能随心所欲地改变过去……”

“We can’t change the past as we please…

1971年，通用电气公司（GE）正在开发一种基于新型可编程只读存储器（PROM）技术的可编程逻辑器件。这款实验性器件改进了IBM的ROAM（只读关联存储器），实现了多级逻辑。当时英特尔刚刚推出了浮栅紫外EPROM，因此GE的研究人员将这项技术融入到自己的器件中。GE的这款器件是首款可擦除PLD，比Altera的EPLD早了十多年。GE获得了多项可编程逻辑器件的早期专利。[5][6][7]

“In 1971, General Electric Company (GE) was developing a programmable logic device based on the new Programmable Read-Only Memory (PROM) technology. This experimental device improved on IBM’s ROAM [read-only associative memory] by allowing multilevel logic. Intel had just introduced the floating-gate UV EPROM so the researcher at GE incorporated that technology. The GE device was the first erasable PLD ever developed, predating the Altera EPLD by over a decade. GE obtained several early patents on programmable logic devices.[5][6][7]”

“真正的原因是，我认为他们制造了第一个采用CMOS PLD的芯片（我不确定），但他们在视频中没有提到这一点。

“The true part is they made the first in CMOS PLD I think (not sure) but they don’t say it in the video.

史蒂夫·莱布森，Tirias Research 首席分析师（荣誉退休）/编辑/B2B 技术营销人员/故事讲述者/内容大师/布道者/工程师/IEEE 高级会员/诗人

Steve Leibson, Principal Analyst Emeritus, Tirias Research/Editor/B2B Technology Marketer/Storyteller/Content Ninja/Evangelist/Engineer/IEEE Senior Member/Poet

“奥雷利安·拉扎鲁特：‘我们不能随心所欲地改变过去’ 我完全同意。

“Aurelian Lazarut: “We can’t change the past as we please” I could not agree more.

“我查阅了您引用的维基百科文章中提到的专利。GE固态部门从未参与MOS器件的研发，我也没有找到任何证据表明GE曾生产过EPROM，更不用说可擦除FPGA了。您引用的大部分专利，包括图纸，似乎都与熔断器有关，例如哈里斯二极管阵列和MMI的PAL等双极器件中使用的熔断器。”

“I’ve looked at the patents cited by the Wikipedia article you quoted. GE Solid State was never a factor in MOS development, and I find no evidence that GE ever produced an EPROM, much less an erasable FPGA. It appears that most of the patents you cited, including the drawings, are devoted to fusible links, as found in bipolar devices like Harris diode arrays and MMI’s PALs.

“所以，看来我们的分歧在于‘发明’这个词。GE的专利确实设想了FPGA，甚至是可擦除FPGA，但我找不到任何证据表明GE曾经拥有生产如此复杂器件的工艺技术，尤其是在1971年。毕竟，英特尔早在1971年11月就公开了1702 PMOS EPROM。你认为GE在那之后需要多久才能研发出可行的MOS工艺？”

“So, it appears our disagreement centers around the word “invented.” GE’s patent certainly envisions FPGAs and even erasable FPGAs, but I find no evidence that GE ever had the process technology to produce such a complex device, especially not in 1971. After all, Intel first disclosed the 1702 PMOS EPROM in November 1971. How long do you think it would take GE to come up with a workable MOS process after that?

“我关于MOS发展的信息来自巴塞特的《迈向数字时代》，这是该领域的权威著作，引用了大量参考文献。你引用的是维基百科。维基百科是个很棒的资源，但远称不上权威。我经常使用维基百科，但总是需要用更权威的参考文献来验证它的‘事实’。”

“My information about MOS development comes from Bassett’s ‘To The Digital Age,’ the definitive work on the subject with a ton of references. You’re quoting Wikipedia to me. Wikipedia is a great resource, but hardly a definitive one. I use Wikipedia a lot, but always need to confirm its ‘facts’ with more definitive references.”

（注：如果您想了解另一种观点，即 Altera 是首个可重编程 PLD 的发明者，请参阅维基百科上关于 FPGA 的条目：Altera 成立于 1983 年，并于 1984 年推出了业界首款可重编程逻辑器件——EP300。该器件的封装中有一个石英窗口，用户可以通过紫外线灯照射芯片来擦除存储器件配置的 EPROM 单元。）

(Note: If you’d like to see an opposite view crediting Altera with the first reprogrammable PLD, check out this Wikipedia entry about the FPGA: Altera was founded in 1983 and delivered the industry’s first reprogrammable logic device in 1984 – the EP300 – which featured a quartz window in the package that allowed users to shine an ultra-violet lamp on the die to erase the EPROM cells that held the device configuration.”)

在后续研究中，我发现维基百科条目中关于通用电气（GE）发明可擦除PLD的说法已经在互联网上广泛传播，在Reddit讨论区和其他地方都能找到，而且总是引用维基百科条目。我身边的PLD和FPGA专家从未听说过GE是PLD开发商或供应商。我们加起来拥有超过100年的PLD和FPGA经验。

In subsequent research, I found that the ideas about GE inventing the erasable PLD from the Wikipedia entry have spread across the Internet and can be found in reddit discussions and elsewhere, always citing the Wikipedia entry. People in my inner circle of PLD and FPGA experts have never heard of GE as a PLD developer or supplier. Together, we’ve got more than 100 years of PLD and FPGA experience.

我查阅了维基百科“可编程阵列逻辑”词条中引用的三项通用电气（GE）专利。我看到的是多发射极双极晶体管的原理图，很像当时流行的TTL器件的输入晶体管，通过导线和保险丝连接。但我没有看到完整的逻辑门。GE的设计本质上是一种双极型设计理念，与Signetics和MMI的PLD类似。在我看来，GE只是在英特尔于1971年发布1702 PMOS EPROM后不久，就将英特尔的EPROM技术作为一种可能的实现方式添加到专利申请中。

I’ve looked at the three GE patents cited in the Wikipedia entry for “Programmable Array Logic.” What I see are schematics of multi-emitter bipolar transistors, much like the input transistors of TTL devices in popular use at the time, joined by wires and fuses. What I don’t see are complete logic gates. The GE design is very much a bipolar design concept, similar in nature to the Signetics and MMI PLDs. It appears to me that GE simply threw Intel’s EPROM technology into the patent application as a possible embodiment shortly after Intel announced the 1702 PMOS EPROM in 1971.

据我所知，这项专利概念从未付诸实践。当时，通用电气（GE）的商业半导体部门生产双极型功率晶体管、二极管、三端双向可控硅开关元件（TRIAC）和光电器件。根据我当时的记忆以及一些谷歌搜索的结果，GE生产的少量集成电路也都是双极型功率器件。GE随后分别于1980年和1985年收购了Intersil和RCA的半导体部门，并开始提供集成电路产品。然而，GE首席执行官杰克·韦尔奇（Jack Welch）很快就对半导体行业的周期性和短暂的低利润感到失望，于1988年将GE固态业务全部出售给了哈里斯半导体（Harris Semiconductor），导致GE固态业务彻底崩溃。1999年，哈里斯半导体从哈里斯公司分拆出来，并更名为Intersil。2017年，瑞萨电子（Renesas）收购了这家重生的Intersil。

As far as I can tell, this patent concept was never reduced to practice. GE’s commercial semiconductor division was making bipolar power transistors, diodes, triacs, and optoelectronic devices during that period. What few ICs GE produced were bipolar power devices, based on what I remember of that time and based on some Google-fu searches. GE subsequently bought Intersil in 1980 and RCA’s semiconductor division in 1985, and started to offer ICs after that, but GE’s CEO Jack Welch soon soured on the cyclic nature and transient low-profitability of the semiconductor business and nuked GE Solid State by selling all of it to Harris Semiconductor in 1988. In 1999, Harris Semiconductor spun out of Harris and renamed itself, resurrecting the name Intersil. Renesas bought the resurrected Intersil in 2017.

所以，我想关于通用电气PLD和可擦除PLD发明的问题，最终都归结于你对“发明”一词的定义。如果我问你谁发明了电话，我估计你的答案会是“亚历山大·格雷厄姆·贝尔”，因为他的专利优先于许多其他竞争者。然而，工程师兼西部电气公司联合创始人伊莱沙·格雷当然也可以被认为是电话的真正发明者，有些人也确实这么认为，但贝尔的专利具有优先权，而且贝尔随后将整个电话行业系统化。

So, I guess the question of GE’s PLD and erasable PLD invention all boils down to your definition of the word “invent.” If I ask you who invented the telephone, I’d expect your answer would be “Alexander Graham Bell,” because his patent is upheld over many other comers. Yet Elisha Gray, engineer and co-founder of Western Electric, could certainly be considered the original inventor of the telephone, and is by some, but Bell’s patent has priority and Bell subsequently systematized the entire telephone industry.

如果我问你飞机是谁发明的，我猜你的答案会是“奥维尔和威尔伯·莱特”，但巴西的阿尔贝托·桑托斯-杜蒙和法国的维克多·塔坦也都声称自己是发明者。然而，莱特兄弟并非只造了一架飞机。他们系统地发展了飞机概念，并将商用飞机推向市场，因此我们才将他们铭记为飞机的发明者。

If I ask you who invented the airplane, I’d expect your answer to be “Orville and Wilbur Wright,” but Brazil’s Alberto Santos-Dumont also has a claim as does France’s Victor Tatin. However, the Wright brothers didn’t just build a one-off airplane. They systematically developed their aircraft concepts and brought commercial airplanes to market, so we remember them as the inventors.

我们将让拉扎鲁特先生在这次LinkedIn对话中作最后发言。他第二天回复了我上面的最后一条消息：

We will give Mr. Lazarut the last word in this LinkedIn conversation. He replied to my last message above a day later:

Aurelian Lazarut，Adaptive Design ltd. 的首席技术官

Aurelian Lazarut, CTO at Adaptive Design ltd.

“史蒂夫，

“Steve,

“我并非想贬低 Altera 的成就，只是陈述事实。市场部门的说法总要有所保留。EP300 是第一款 CMOS 可擦除 PLD（并进行了一些关键改进）[链接至 1984 年 EDN 上关于 Altera EP300 的报道文章，如下所述]。

“I’m not trying to minimize Altera’s achievements, just stating the facts. The claims of marketing departments have to water down a bit. The EP300 was the first CMOS erasable PLD (with some key improvements) [with a link to a 1984 EDN article announcing Altera’s EP300, referenced below].

“Altera无需捏造任何声明，因为他们是伟大的创新者，这一点永远不会改变。”

“Altera’s doesn’t have to ‘cook’ any claims because they are great innovators and nothing will change that.”

我认为拉扎鲁特先生纠结于一位级别较低的市场营销人员犯下的错误，这位人员负责为Altera的社交媒体账号撰写宣传文案，可能在加入公司之前从未听说过“PLD”或“FPGA”这两个术语。这个人及其错误不应被误认为是Altera市场部门的官方立场。我怀疑这位文案撰写人员的工作未来可能会受到更高层级的审查，或许会受到Altera法务部门的审查，他们通常会严格把控这类声明。显然，引发拉扎鲁特先生最初在LinkedIn上发表评论的那条关于FPGA的声明在我有机会看到之前就被迅速删除了。有人发现了错误并进行了更正。这些公司的高级市场经理对行业历史相当了解。（坦白说：我曾在Xilinx（五年）和Intel FPGA（现为Altera，两年）的市场部门工作过，并为这两家公司撰写过博客。）

I think Mr. Lazarut is harping about a mistake made by a lower-level marketing minion who writes blurbs for Altera’s social media accounts and possibly never heard the terms “PLD” or “FPGA” before joining the company. That person and their errors should not be mistaken for the official position of Altera’s marketing department. I suspect the blurb writer’s work may get more senior-level scrutiny in the future, possibly from the Altera legal department, which usually rides herd on these sorts of claims. Apparently, the FPGA claim that triggered Mr. Lazarut’s initial LinkedIn comment was deleted quickly, before I had a chance to see it. Someone caught the mistake and fixed it. The more senior marketing managers in those companies are fairly well aware of their industry’s history. (Full disclosure: I worked in the marketing departments of both Xilinx (for five years) and Intel FPGA (now Altera, for two years), and I wrote blogs for both companies.)

我很高兴拉扎鲁特先生找到了那篇关于 Altera EP300 的 EDN 文章。像安迪·拉帕波特撰写的这篇 EDN 文章，由于是当时的文献，因此可以作为可靠的信息来源。然而，即使是这类参考资料也可能出错。有些编辑的技术水平比其他编辑更高。我曾在 EDN 工作了 11 年，并担任了 3 年的主编。那是在 EEJournal 创办前几年。

I’m glad Mr. Lazarut found the EDN article about the Altera EP300. Period EDN articles like this one by Andy Rappaport can be valid sources for facts because they were written at the time. However, even those sorts of references can be wrong. Some editors are more technical than others. I worked for EDN for 11 years and served as its Editor in Chief for three years. That was a few years before the founding of EEJournal.

听着，我跟这件事没有任何私心，我只陈述事实，而且我的事实并非来自维基百科。通用电气（GE）真的像维基百科词条里说的那样发明了脉冲存储器（PLD）和可擦除脉冲存储器（PLD）吗？还是仅仅通过专利构想了它们？我身边的人告诉我，有很多专利只是纸面上的设想，从未真正投入生产。我对此持开放态度。如果有人能证明GE的贡献远不止一两项专利，我很乐意再写一篇文章来阐述GE对脉冲存储器的贡献。你们怎么看？请在下方留言评论。

Look, I’ve got no dogs in this fight, only facts, and my facts don’t come from Wikipedia. Did GE invent the PLD and the erasable PLD as the Wikipedia entry claims, or did it merely envision them through the patents? My inner circle advises me that there are plenty of paper patents that envision products or devices that were never built. I’m keeping an open mind. If someone can show me that GE did more than just write a patent or three, I’m happy to write another article that explains GE’s contribution to PLDs. What do you think? Leave your comments and ideas below.
